### 405. 高能日本旅行纪录片剪辑

**Author**: [26氏｜AI動画制作の人](https://x.com/croflaiworks)  **Date**: 2026-04-04  **Language**: en

> 这是一个为 Seedance 2.0（通过 ClaudeCode + Renoise）设计的复杂分段提示词，用于生成 15 秒的高能日本旅行纪录片剪辑。该提示词指定了五个不同的场景（鸟居、京都后巷、涩谷十字路口、新干线、东京航拍），每个场景都包含详细的运镜方式（环绕、快速推轨、360 度旋转、升降、快速摇摄）以及具体的视觉要求（照片级真实感、自然胶片颗粒、无 CGI）。此外，还包含了音频风格规范（高能 EDM，140BPM）。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/821a99face09c800040cae876cce56df/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/821a99face09c800040cae876cce56df/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
Travel documentary footage of Japan, shot on Sony A7 IV,  natural film grain, photorealistic, no CGI, no stylization.

  [0-3s] A real weathered red torii gate at night. Camera starts  ground-level at the base of the gate looking up — then rapidly  orbits 180 degrees around the torii post, accelerating as it  swings, revealing the misty stone steps and orange lantern glow  on the other side. The movement is fast and sweeping.  

[3-6s] A narrow Kyoto backstreet at night. Camera bursts forward  at high speed down the alley in a fast dolly rush — wooden machiya  houses and red lanterns blur past on both sides. A woman in a dark  kimono steps aside. Camera tilts sharply upward mid-rush to reveal  the sky framed between the rooftops, then snaps back down.  

[6-9s] Shibuya scramble crossing at night. Camera starts low in  the crowd, spins 360 degrees fast at hip level — people and neon  signs streak past — then rapidly cranes straight up into the air,  rising fast to reveal the full intersection below. The spin-to-rise  transition is sudden and energetic. 

 [9-12s] A shinkansen N700 bullet train. Camera holds static for a  split second — then the train BLASTS past at full speed inches from  the lens, the shockwave shaking the frame violently. Camera  immediately whips to track it from behind, accelerating to match  speed, rice fields streaking. 

 [12-15s] Wide aerial Tokyo at dusk. Camera starts in tight on city  streets, then rockets upward fast — buildings shrinking rapidly —  spinning slightly as it rises, until the full Tokyo bay and Mount  Fuji horizon are revealed. Camera decelerates and holds the grand  final frame steady.  Audio style: High-energy EDM, hard synth drops, 140BPM, bass hit  on each camera snap. No text, subtitles, watermarks, or logos. Quality: photorealistic, natural textures, real locations, fluid  motion. Avoid: CGI look, artificial lighting, slow or static camera.
```

Seedance V2 

The Biomechanical Parasite 

(异形寄生体撕裂)" theme: "H.R. Giger / Dead Space / Visceral Sci-Fi Horror" 

chinese_prompt: | [00:00-00:04] 镜头1：跟随镜头。在烟雾缭绕的地下狂欢俱乐部里，一个背部裸露着红色机械脊柱的女机器人在人群中穿梭。她突然转过身，精致的白瓷面容开始剧烈痉挛。 [00:04-00:10] 镜头2：特写至中景。女机器人的白瓷面容并非裂开，而是像蛋壳一样被内部的东西极其暴力地击碎。大量黑色的黏稠液体喷涌而出，一个长满生锈金属獠牙和多重下颚的异形生物头颅从她脖子里钻出。同时，她背部的红色机械脊柱猛烈撕裂皮肤，异变成一条巨大的、滴着腐蚀性酸液的多节金属蝎尾。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：远景。俱乐部的灯光变成病态的荧光绿。异形蝎尾猛地刺入舞池地面，女机器人残破的躯体被寄生体悬吊在半空中，发出刺耳的非人类尖叫。周围的人群惊恐万分，被喷射出的黑色有机蛛网死死缠在墙上。极致的生物机械恐怖感，血肉与金属混合的惊悚特效。 

english prompt | [00:00-00:04] Shot 1: Follow shot. In a smoky underground rave club, a female cyborg with an exposed red mechanical spine walks through the crowd. She suddenly turns around, her delicate white porcelain face beginning to convulse violently. [00:04-00:10] Shot 2: Close-up to mid-shot. The cyborg's porcelain face doesn't just split; it is violently shattered from the inside like an eggshell. A massive amount of thick, black viscous fluid erupts outward as an alien head with rusted metallic fangs and multiple mandibles forces its way out of her neck. Simultaneously, her red mechanical spine violently tears through her back, mutating into a giant, multi-jointed metallic scorpion tail dripping with corrosive acid. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Wide shot. The club's lighting turns a sickly fluorescent green. The alien tail violently impales the dance floor, suspending the cyborg's ruined body in mid-air as it emits an ear-piercing, non-human shriek. The surrounding crowd is paralyzed with absolute terror, pinned against the walls by webs of black organic matter. Extreme biomechanical horror, terrifying VFX mixing flesh and metal.
```

Create a fast, seamless 16:9 flying POV sequence with five linked shots.
Shot 1: Start inside a dark ancient stone corridor with a wooden door at the far end. Fly straight toward it at high speed. As the camera reaches the door, it begins to swing open, revealing a gap of bright blue ocean behind it. End mid-opening.
Shot 2: Continue through the opening door into the ocean. Fly forward through fish, bubbles, light rays, and underwater plants. A giant fish approaches and opens its mouth directly in front of the camera. End inside its mouth.
Shot 3: The darkness inside the fish’s mouth becomes the dark interior of a large stainless steel kitchen hood or service opening. Fly forward into a busy high-end restaurant kitchen with chefs, flames, steam, pans, and plated dishes. Fly low over the counter. End with the glowing opening of a large industrial oven filling the frame.
Shot 4: Continue into the glowing oven as it transforms into a volcanic lava tunnel with molten light and black rock. Fly through the tunnel. End with a bright circular stone opening filling the frame.
Shot 5: Continue through the circular opening into a Mediterranean cliffside village above the sea. Fly fast between terraces, rooftops, arches, and sunlit walls toward the ocean. End with a wide sea-facing reveal.
Fast, smooth, continuous movement. No flying device, shadow, or reflection. Cinematic.
```

**Author**: [ChrisTheNerv](https://x.com/ChrisTheNerv)  **Date**: 2026-04-03  **Language**: zh

> 一份极其详尽的 Seedance 2.0 15 秒一镜到底提示词，描述了一位中国美女在末日城市中变身为装甲战士的电影级场景，涵盖了具体的运镜方式、音效设计及物理真实感要求。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/28a539813b37484f2f914d1836be4102/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/28a539813b37484f2f914d1836be4102/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
100%真人实拍质感，好莱坞IMAX大片质感，自然光影，冷峻纪实风格，阴天自然光，全程手持一镜到底，呼吸感晃动，随机焦点失焦，16:9宽屏。
【场景环境】
一条延伸至远方的被摧毁的城市街道。两侧是废墟混凝土建筑，钢筋外露，窗户破碎，部分建筑仍在燃烧，橙色火光与黑烟升腾。废弃汽车散落在开裂的沥青路面上，其中数辆正在燃烧。阴沉灰色天空，烟尘悬浮于空气中。多颗陨石拖着火焰与浓烟尾迹划过天际。背景中惊恐的平民在废墟间四散奔逃，有人跌倒，有人拖拽伤员。
【主体人物】
中国美女，深红色头发扎成松散凌乱的发髻，几缕发丝垂在脸旁。皮肤白皙，五官锋利，下颚线分明，自然妆容，眼妆细致。着装：黑色长款皮革风衣内搭黑色背心，黑色牛仔超短裙，黑色平底战斗靴，无腰带，双手佩戴黑色科技感护手。表情紧绷隐忍，微带痛苦，眉头微蹙——眼神中充满绝望与强烈的意志。
【15秒一镜到底·觉醒打击版】
0-2秒·觉醒
镜头低角度仰拍，取景她的上半身与面部，仰望独自站在被摧毁街道中央的她。风吹动她的黑色皮革风衣。她张开嘴唇，用日语尖叫:"かくせいしろ！"她猛然张开右手，黑色科技护手噼啪作响。紫色水晶质感的电弧从她手臂和护手爆发。空气向内压缩，空间扭曲畸变。冲击波发出低沉的音爆。紫色符文线条浮现并环绕她身体运转。
2-5秒·爆发
镜头开始环绕她运动。胸口爆裂出暗金色裂纹，浓稠的金色液体如血般涌出。她痛苦地尖叫。紫色雾气与细密电弧向外涌射。她的全部衣物从内部撕裂炸开，每一片都燃烧成灰烬——什么都不剩。有机装甲碎片向外爆射，随后以不自然的方式回缩重新附着在她身体上。紫色纹路对称蔓延过她的面部。面颊上裂开一道裂缝，露出下方脉动的紫色光芒。同时，多条机械臂状的附肢从她背部猛烈爆出——暗色金属质感，刀刃形状，如恶魔之翼般向外展开。火花、蓝色电弧和金色能量粒子从爆发点炸裂。镜头从背后捕捉完整的展开画面——她的剪影映衬在灰色天空下，机械附肢如扇形展开。爆发声如撕裂金属混合电弧放电。
5-8秒·生长
有机物质从体内渗出，表面闪烁虹彩光泽。白色装甲板对撞融合，留下灼烧痕迹。装甲向下延伸覆盖她的双腿，平底战斗靴被装甲完全吞噬取代，形成白色与暗紫色交织的装甲战靴，伴随微小火花锁定到位。她咬紧牙关发出痛苦的嘶吼。胸口核心如余烬般明灭闪烁。紫黑色金属蔓延覆盖她的面部，形成凹凸不平的面具，左眼比右眼先被覆盖。复眼开始成型，带有液态光介质不规则地闪烁。镜头持续环绕她运动。
8-12秒·完成
镜头继续缓慢环绕她。面具完全封合。角状结构从头顶向上生长，燃烧着紫金色火焰。一只复眼稳定发光，另一只带有电流不稳定的闪烁。装甲以白色与暗紫色交织，凹凸不平且布满战损，发光的紫色裂缝中渗出光液。机械附肢在她身后微微摆动。装甲每块锁定时发出清脆的金属卡扣声，随后是层次分明的机械归位声。她缓缓低头审视自己的双手——白色与暗紫色交织的装甲护手指节渗出紫色光芒。她缓缓抬头直视前方，复眼骤然全亮。
12-15秒·超音速冲锋
镜头急速后退。她双脚蹬地，脚下沥青瞬间炸裂形成深坑，一道猛烈的紫色能量爆炸从起飞点向外扩散，碎石与沥青碎块被炸飞至空中。她以突破音障的速度腾空飞射，直冲镜头方向——锥形音爆雾气在身后形成，机械附肢被气流向后压平，画面产生强烈的动态模糊。她的身影越来越大，越来越近，占满整个画面。紫色能量尾迹拖在身后。最后一帧，她的装甲面甲几乎撞上镜头，复眼猩红全亮，画面骤然切黑。
【环境音】
觉醒时的低沉音爆，撕裂金属与电弧放电声，痛苦的尖叫声，清脆的金属卡扣声，机械附肢展开的沉重金属声，背景中燃烧的噼啪声与远处爆炸声，最后的超音速冲锋伴随起飞点爆炸声、音爆冲击与急速逼近的风压声，画面切黑瞬间一切归于寂静。
【物理质感强化】
真实光影，变身前面部可见的皮肤质感，皮革风衣变身前可见的真实磨损与撕裂。机械附肢具有物理重量和惯性——展开后轻微摆动，并非僵硬不动。装甲板以白色与暗紫色交织，表面可见划痕、焊接痕迹和不平整边缘——不是干净光滑的。所有动作沉稳有力，充满痛苦但坚定——她在承受中觉醒。偶有轻微镜头晃动，纯正手持跟拍感。
【声音设计】
从尖叫激活到爆裂机械爆发，层层递进至起飞点爆炸与超音速冲锋的音爆，最终骤然切入寂静。整个序列散发着绝对的力量。仅生成音效，无音乐。
```

### 432. 戏剧性动漫 MV：坠落的白虎与淡定的猫

**Author**: [The Anxious Mind](https://x.com/drjoetw)  **Date**: 2026-04-03  **Language**: en

> 一份高度精细、分秒级（0-15 秒）的提示词，用于制作一部充满戏剧性、快节奏剪辑且带有喜剧反转的动漫音乐视频。场景设定为一只白虎从天而降，坠入 1930 年代东京的稻田，而一只橘猫正在田里插秧。提示词强调了电影般的张力、快速剪辑、POV 畸变以及突如其来的喜剧效果。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/a77c73dfb73742d543fa325ffb094a77/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/a77c73dfb73742d543fa325ffb094a77/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
A highly dramatic, fast-cut anime MV with exaggerated cinematic tension and comedic payoff. 1930s Tokyo rice paddies, muddy textures, stormy sky. Extreme sense of falling urgency using rapid cuts, POV distortion, speed ramps, spinning camera, impact zooms. Dramatic orchestral music escalating non-stop, then sudden comedic release at the end. No dialogue, no voice-over. Each shot 0.6–1.2s.

0–0.8s (HOOK)
Extreme close-up: muddy water surface. Ripple expands → reflection shows a white tiger falling from the sky at insane speed.

0.8–1.6s
SMASH CUT → tiger tumbling mid-air, body spinning violently, wind tearing fur.

1.6–2.4s
POV tiger → ground rushing upward extremely fast. Rice paddies distort with speed.

2.4–3.2s
Cut → orange cat in muddy farmer clothes, calmly planting rice. Slow, peaceful motion.

3.2–4.0s
Back to tiger → extreme close-up eyes, panic rising. Sunglasses slightly slipping.

4.0–4.8s
Rapid micro-cuts: sky spin → ground zoom → cat step → sky spin → distance collapsing fast.

4.8–5.6s
Top-down shot → tiger perfectly aligned to crash into orange cat.

5.6–6.4s
Tiger yanks parachute → explosive deploy → instant violent spinning chaos.

6.4–7.2s
Camera rotates 360° with tiger. Horizon flips. Ground now dangerously close.

7.2–8.0s
Parachute unstable → cords under extreme tension. Tiger loses control completely.

8.0–8.8s
Tiger panic peaks → aggressively twists cords into a tight yarn-ball knot.

8.8–9.6s
Parachute collapses → freefall speed doubles. Sound compresses into heartbeat rhythm.

9.6–10.4s
Ultra-fast dive shot → motion blur streaks. Orange cat grows rapidly in frame.

10.4–11.2s
Cut → cat finally senses something. Slight head turn.

11.2–12.0s (IMPACT BUILD)
Extreme close-up: tiger face in silent scream → smash zoom toward ground.

12.0–12.8s (IMPACT)
Massive muddy explosion. Water and mud burst upward in slow motion.

12.8–13.6s
Mud rain falls. Silence. Shapes slowly appear through the splash.

13.6–14.2s (REVEAL)
White tiger sitting on top of the orange cat’s back, slightly dazed but intact.

14.2–15.0s (COMEDIC PAYOFF)
Close-up: orange cat’s face, completely covered in mud, eyes half-open, extremely annoyed.
White tiger casually adjusts sunglasses while sitting on him.
Freeze frame → dramatic music abruptly cuts.
```

### 437. 元素之战短片提示词（火与冰）

**Environment:**

A massive medieval-fantasy city under siege at dusk. Stone towers, cathedral spires, and narrow streets stretch toward the horizon while fire spreads through rooftops and smoke rises into the orange evening sky. Wind currents swirl between the tall buildings.

**Action:**

15.0s sequence from the first-person perspective of a colossal dragon in flight. The viewer sees the edges of scaled wings occasionally entering frame as the dragon glides between towers. Heat shimmer ripples from its throat with every breath.

At the 2-second mark the dragon dives sharply between two cathedral spires.

Stone gargoyles and stained-glass windows rush past at extreme speed.

The dragon unleashes a stream of fire across a city wall below, igniting entire streets.

Velocity Ramp choreography: the moment the dragon pulls up from the dive slows dramatically — embers, sparks, and falling debris suspended in mid-air — before snapping back as the dragon bursts through a collapsing tower.

**Camera:**

Fast aerial predator POV weaving through the skyline, banking sharply between towers and rooftops.

**Style & Constraints:**

Photorealistic fire simulation, volumetric smoke, cinematic sunset lighting, realistic wing turbulence and debris physics, 8K resolution.
```

**Author**: [Adam也叫吉米](https://x.com/Adam38363368936)  **Date**: 2026-04-03  **Language**: zh

> 一份详细的多镜头提示词，用于使用 Seedance 2.0 生成跑车（LaFerrari）的商业摄影视频，重点关注特定的摄像机运动（电影摄影）和高质量的视觉细节。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/4ded49308f98b933f6d10c3cb024c835/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/4ded49308f98b933f6d10c3cb024c835/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
跑车商业摄影分镜

镜头一 (1.5s): 画面开头是跑车，正面镜头，展示标志性的“愤怒”前脸。

镜头二 (1s): 近景镜头，虚拟摄像机慢慢围绕车标进行环绕运动（不转圈，纯环绕），特写法拉利跃马标志。

镜头三 (1.5s): 近景镜头，斜看LaFerrari独特的蝴蝶门（车身侧面），进行缓慢环绕运镜，强调其车身线条。

镜头四 (1s): 镜头移动至车尾处，进行近景拍摄，随后慢慢往后拉，运用希区柯克镜头（Dolly Zoom）效果，呈现视觉冲击感。

镜头五 (1s): 近景镜头拍摄车的后视镜，保持缓慢环绕运镜。

镜头六 (1s): 镜头缓慢向前推进，采用低角度推进运镜。车静止，呈现强烈透视感、光影渐变。专业汽车摄影，深邃背景，电影级构图，重心沉稳，高清实拍画质。

镜头七 (1s): 横向轨道滑动运镜，镜头平行扫过LaFerrari车身。车静止不动，流畅平移画面。侧光勾勒腰线，轮毂特写，细腻反光，高级感，电影运镜，干净构图。

镜头八 (1s): 俯视视角，镜头缓慢下降运镜。静态跑车，完美车身比例，顶光质感，干净地面反射，航拍感运镜，车静止，构图对称，奢华质感，8K超写实，广告级画面。

镜头九 (1s): 镜头缓慢推近特写，从整车推到车灯/轮毂/腰线。车静止，微距细节，光影渐变，电影感浅景深，高级质感，细节锐利，商业摄影。

说明：

画面与画面之间无需转场。

画面中不出现任何人。

最高画质：8K。
```

Smoke and light dissipate. The glowing ball settles in the goal. The goalkeeper lies stunned. The football master stands in silence, turns away calmly, and flicks his wrist as the crowd erupts. ### 460. Seedance 2.0 徐克风格武侠电影提示词

**Author**: [Adam也叫吉米](https://x.com/Adam38363368936)  **Date**: 2026-04-03  **Language**: zh

> 这是一份高度详尽的多镜头提示词，用于生成徐克导演风格的武侠电影片段。场景设定在张家界天门山，强调动态运镜与特定的动作序列。需要提供一张角色面部/服装的参考图。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/8c591505bff6677a20938f04c02b8e2d/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/8c591505bff6677a20938f04c02b8e2d/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
【云窟剑影·天门血战】
——张家界天门山一镜到底
核心风格： 徐克新式武侠大片、一镜到底、高帧率、4K超清。

色调： 徐克亮调，“冷玉青墨 + 琥珀流光”。高对比、山岚自带柔光滤镜，锐化人物轮廓，达芬奇工业级调色。

场景： 张家界天门山（湘西诡谲地貌。天门洞开，吞云吐雾；999级天梯垂直挂于绝壁，如通天之路；石林石柱如利剑攒蹙，云海翻腾间栈道若隐若现，飞鸟不渡）。

运镜轨迹：
低角度仰拍（强调天险） → 急速推向洞口 → 180°横向平移（展现栈道激斗） → 俯冲下坠 → 缓拉回正 → 逆光特写。

镜头脚本：
0-4秒【起势·天门云涌】：

运镜： 极低角度仰拍，镜头从天梯底部向上急速俯冲掠过。

画面： 人物面部参考@【@图1】武侠侠客装扮（白衣胜雪，斗笠压低，手持长剑） 孤身立于999级天梯中央。

动作： 狂风卷起周遭云雾，【@图1】右手扶剑柄，左手捏剑指划过鼻梁。镜头拉远，展现其背后的天门洞，宛如一只巨大的苍天之眼。

4-8秒【激斗·悬梯截杀】：

运镜： 180°环绕平移。

画面： 十余名劲装死士从两侧如猿猴般贴着绝壁荡下。

动作： 【@图1】足尖点梯，身形倒挂旋转。（徐克式慢动量感） 剑不出鞘，以鞘代棍点、拨、挑，气浪将台阶上的雨水震成水雾。镜头急速环绕，捕捉残影与金属撞击的火花。

8-11秒【破阵·纵横石林】：

运镜： 镜头跟随人物俯冲，穿过石拱门进入悬崖栈道。

画面： 刺客布下钢丝阵。

动作： 【@图1】长剑终于出鞘（剑身映射琥珀色日光），一记横扫千军。剑气化作青墨弧光，斩断钢丝，钢丝崩断回弹击碎崖石。他在仅容一人的栈道上闪转腾挪，身影与石柱交错，虚实结合。

11-15秒【收势·雾散孤峰】：

运镜： 镜头从洞口向外缓拉，由窄变宽，展现万丈深渊。

画面： 漫天符纸（或枯叶）随风飞舞，【@图1】立于天门洞边缘，脚下即是云海。

动作： 挽剑花归鞘，反手背剑。阳光从天门洞背后透射过来，形成巨大的丁达尔效应。

定格： 镜头推进至极度特写，斗笠边缘滴下一滴血，划过下颌。眼神凌厉如电，背景是无尽的山河大观。
```

Aircraft vanish into dimensional folds.

Bridges twist into impossible angles.

Chase-cam flying through intersecting city layers as gravity shifts between realities.

Velocity ramp when the dimensional rift expands wide enough to swallow an entire city block.

The dimensional entity stands between them.

**Author**: [Adam也叫吉米](https://x.com/Adam38363368936)  **Date**: 2026-04-02  **Language**: zh

> 一份为 Seedance 2.0 准备的详细多镜头提示词，用于生成 15 秒的日系电影风格视频。视频包含特定的运镜、光影（日落/暖橙色逆光），以及 15 个详细的镜头序列，描述了模特在城市天桥场景下的动作与情绪变化。需要提供人物参考图。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/bca1351aab3c391c8e1bd4899e99dc82/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/bca1351aab3c391c8e1bd4899e99dc82/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
人物参考@【@图1】，转真人实拍风格。模特身材，冷白皮，纤细手臂，前凸后翘
15秒手持呼吸感视频，日系电影风格，黄昏暖橙逆光，轻微胶片颗粒，低饱和色调，无字幕无台词
环境：夕阳西下，水泥的立交桥桥洞下，车道偶尔有车辆驶过，人行天桥、高架桥、主干道车流，黄昏暖橙逆光，车流光影流动
运镜：全程手持轻微晃动、呼吸感、自然跟拍、无稳定器、真实电影感
分镜（15秒内15个镜头）：  
00:00｜第1秒 手持全身固定，少女侧身倚靠混凝土栏杆，一手搭栏；前景为倚靠的全身姿态，背景是模糊车流与暖黄黄昏，氛围松弛。
00:01｜第2秒 手持全身微推，少女起身向上伸展手臂，嘴角浅笑眼底空落；前景为逆光发丝与舒展动作，背景是虚化钢架与流动光斑，轻快又怅然。
00:02｜第3秒 手持全身跟拍，少女轻跳前行；前景为跳跃动态，背景是天桥地面与模糊车流，青春轻松。
00:03｜第4秒 手持近景特写，少女侧逆光拨乱刘海，睫毛染金；前景为侧脸与手部，背景是虚化栏杆与车流，慵懒温柔。
00:04｜第5秒 手持手部特写，指尖轻划粗糙栏杆；前景为指尖与纹理，背景是密集车流与暖橙黄昏，动作细腻。
00:05｜第6秒 手持全身横移，少女席地而坐低头望车流，眼神放空；前景为坐姿全身，背景是移动车灯与钢架，情绪微沉。
00:06｜第7秒 手持近景慢推，少女抬头望天空，笑意淡去显伤感；前景为安静面部，背景是黄昏云层与建筑，情绪克制。
00:07｜第8秒 手持全身固定，少女起身伸展腰背，逆光勾勒轮廓；前景为伸展姿态，背景是混凝土结构与车流，孤独干净。
00:08｜第9秒 手持近景特写；前景为领带与手部，背景是虚化栏杆，温柔脆弱。
00:09｜第10秒 手持眼部特写，睫毛逆光分明，眼神藏心事；前景为眼部光影，背景是虚化黄昏，情绪细腻。
00:10｜第11秒 手持全身跟拍，少女转身轻快奔跑；前景为奔跑姿态，背景是天桥转角，重回轻松。
00:11｜第12秒 手持全身侧移，少女跑过转角，身影被光影切割；前景为明暗轮廓，背景是流动光斑，真实手持感。
00:12｜第13秒 手持近景特写，少女低头短暂轻笑；前景为唇间光影，背景是虚化栏杆，情绪明亮。
00:13｜第14秒 手持全身慢推，少女走向桥端伸展手臂指远方；前景为逆光全身，背景是城市黄昏，安静治愈。
00:14｜第15秒 手持全身定格，少女背对镜头望向城市，轻松与伤感交织；前景为飘动裙摆背影，背景是广阔黄昏与车河，留白收尾。

### 482. 超写实跑酷 POV 序列提示词

**Author**: [GENEL | AIを用いた動画制作](https://x.com/genel_ai)  **Date**: 2026-04-02  **Language**: en

> 这是一个为 Seedance 2.0 设计的高细节、多阶段提示词，旨在生成一段超写实、一镜到底的第一人称视角（POV）动作序列。内容描述了一名男子进行极限跑酷的过程，包含惊心动魄的自由落体、节奏感十足的跳跃以及一次险些丧命的滑落，并附带具体的音频和视觉细节。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/377de354cfc135f3ba1c760dab619ff6/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/377de354cfc135f3ba1c760dab619ff6/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
A hyper-realistic, 8K resolution, adrenaline-fueled single-take POV action sequence. The camera is chest-mounted on a man wearing camouflage joggers and worn-out black-and-white sneakers. He stands on the dizzying edge of a rusted skyscraper, 1000 feet above a crystalline turquoise ocean. No clouds, no haze—just a sheer, terrifying vertical drop into the deep blue.

[The Initial Freefall]
The sequence begins with a sudden, heart-stopping leap into a 20-meter vertical freefall. The camera points directly at his feet as the sea surface rushes toward the lens. A deafening, high-pitched whistling 'Hyuo' wind screams past the microphone. Just before the impact, he catches a lower rusted horizontal bar with both hands—white wristband visible—and swings his body forward to land on a tiny vertical pole.

[The Rhythmic Jumps & The Near-Death Slip]
He immediately begins a rhythmic series of high-speed jumps:

Jump 1: A clean, agile spring to a second vertical pole 2 meters away.

Jump 2: A rapid leap to a thin, rusted horizontal pipe.

Jump 3 (The Slip): As he jumps toward the third vertical pole, his right sneaker completely misses the mark and slides off the rusted metal. The camera tilts violently over the edge, staring straight down at the 1000-foot abyss. He lets out a sharp, panicked gasp. For a terrifying second, his body leans into the void, but he desperately claws at the pole with his fingers, his boots scrambling against the side until he manages to hook his leg and haul himself back up.

Jump 4: Still trembling, he forces a frantic, heavy-breathing leap to the next bar to keep the momentum.

Jump 5: A final, explosive long-distance jump to a swaying metal platform. He lands with a heavy, jarring metallic 'Clang', his body hunching low, gripping the vibrating metal for dear life.

[The Ending]
The camera remains in a low, fetal position on the final bar, shaking from the adrenaline. No dialogue. The audio is a visceral layer of the aggressive 'Hyuo' wind, his intense, ragged, and rapid gasping for air, and a loud, thumping heartbeat that resonates as if inside his chest. The harsh midday sun glints off the ocean waves far below, creating a blinding, beautiful, yet lethal glare. Cinematic materials, fluid 120fps motion, hyper-detailed rust and skin textures.
```

[[Parkour POV Freerunning Sequence]] [[First-Person Action]] [[Free Fall Jump]] [[Near-Death Slide]] [[Audio and Visual Detail]] [[Multi-Phase Parkour]] [[Extreme Urban Action]]

延长15秒。0–4秒：【极速坠落·俯瞰地面】主角
图片1
高速坠落，全程张开双臂保持平衡滑翔姿态，镜头锁定其背部，来福士幕墙在两侧急速上飞，地面急速放大，运动模糊极致。画面快速插入地面视角：一辆紫色华为智界R7正在来福士楼下坡道公路上高速驶来，车身散发赛博蓝紫色能量光晕，引擎轰鸣，轮胎摩擦沥青留下两道黑痕。 4–9秒：【坡道冲起·轨迹交汇】紫色智界R7冲上坡道顶端，借助坡道惯性车身前端腾空而起飞到半空中，天窗瞬间自动滑开。镜头在坠落中的主角与冲坡中的智界R7之间高频快速交替——主角始终保持张开双臂的高速坠落姿态，智界R7持续加速冲坡，两条轨迹急速收敛，时间感被压缩到极限，紧迫感拉满。 9–11秒：【最后一秒·姿态骤变·精准落入】距天窗仅剩最后一秒——主角在空中瞬间将张开的双臂猛然收紧夹身，身体从水平滑翔姿态骤然调整为垂直直立，双腿向下笔直对准正在半空中的紫色智界R7天窗开口，动作迅猛果断无任何犹豫。下一瞬间她垂直落入敞开的天窗，身体以极高速穿入车内，座在驾驶位上，全程无慢动作，冲击感真实暴烈。 11–13秒：【四轮落地·保持行驶】车身因接住主角的冲击微微下压后四轮重新踏实落回公路沥青面，悬挂系统剧烈吸收双重冲击。车辆落地后引擎轰鸣声立即拉升，不减速、不停车，四轮摩擦沥青留下新的黑色轮痕，继续全力向前高速行驶。 13–15秒：【车内稳定·能量蓄积】智界R7保持高速行驶，镜头贴近车身侧面低角度跟拍：车身蓝紫色能量纹路开始从四个车轮向车身蔓延扩散，机械传动声从车底隐隐升起并持续增强，车身在高速行驶中微微震颤。变形即将启动的前兆能量在车漆下涌动翻腾。 【风格与画质增强】 逼真的8K画质、超精细机械与能量光效纹理、电影级体积光与热浪效果、完美速度模糊、HDR能量光晕、无伪影、全程实时速度无慢动作。

第三章：第三章（0–15秒）：智界R7行驶变形 · 化身F-14 · 主角站上机背腾空 风格： 粗犷的真实主义风格，35毫米手持胶片美学，自然颗粒感，微妙抖动。 镜头： 多角度剪切跟拍（地面追随 / 低角度贴地 / 机体侧面 / 主角第一视角），全程紧贴机体，变形细节清晰可辨。 氛围： 重庆公路弥漫轻烟与热浪，赛博蓝紫色光影在建筑间折射，正午阳光在金属结构上形成刺眼反光与强烈阴影。 音效： 引擎轰鸣骤然升级 → 金属蒙皮爆裂折叠声 → 液压机翼展开的低沉震颤 → 主角
图片1
在机体外攀爬的金属抓握声 → 驾驶舱气密爆破"嘭"声随即被风声淹没 → 双引擎点火的爆发轰鸣 → F-14腾空的破空尖啸 → 高空强劲气流呼啸覆盖全部音轨 【画面参考/说明】 紫色智界R7在重庆公路行驶过程中完成完整变形，从汽车形态变形为F-14战斗机
图片2
。主角在变形过程中惊险附着机体外部攀爬抓握。主角最终站立于F-14战斗机机背上正中央，双腿微张稳定重心，站稳在机背上。白色西装与马尾在极速气流中剧烈飘动。F-14从重庆公路直接腾空起飞，主角始终屹立机背。 【逐秒时间线】 0–4秒：【公路提速·变形启动】智界R7在重庆公路急速提速。车身面板依次爆裂展开，前引擎盖翻卷化为机械结构，车门向两侧折叠，金属蒙皮沿结构线裂开露出冷冽机械内构。主角在剧烈变形的机体外部向飞机顶部惊险攀爬，手牢牢抓住变形中的金属骨架，随着机体的形变跳跃移位，动作紧张刺激，镜头贴近机体侧面追踪每一个攀爬细节。 4–6秒：【机翼展开·引擎全力重组】F-14标志性后掠机翼从折叠状态猛然展开锁定，镜头贴地低角度拍摄机翼展开全景，热浪与烟尘被机翼气流猛烈掀起。双引擎舱剧烈重组为喷射结构，喷出蓝紫色推力火焰，公路地面被尾焰烤出焦痕。主角此刻已攀爬至机背正中央位置，双脚踩稳机背结构，身体随变形完成而直立站稳。 6–8秒：【主角站上机背·腾空起飞】变形完成瞬间，主角完全直立站于F-14战斗机机背，白色西装衣摆在强烈气流中猛然扬起，马尾完全水平飘动，银色机械部件在正午阳光下强烈反光。F-14双引擎全力点火，机体猛然加速，前轮离地，后轮在最后一刻蹬离沥青，机鼻上仰带着机背上的主角冲入重庆天空。 8–15秒：【腾空掠城·主角屹立机背】F-14垂直爬升后猛然压低机头，以极低高度掠过重庆
```

### 485. 包含 7 张图像的连续变形序列

**Author**: [ヤレヤル](https://x.com/YaReYaRu30Life)  **Date**: 2026-04-01  **Language**: ja

> 这是一个为 Seedance 2.0 设计的超详细日文提示词，旨在创建一个单一的连续镜头（无剪辑），在七张不同的参考图像之间平滑变形。它为每个过渡步骤指定了复杂的摄像机运动（推入、横移、环绕）和变换逻辑（粒子分解、光扫描、液体熔化），同时保持时间连贯性和主体身份。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/86cc15f4765ff5a5be91cae1dfdd092d/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/86cc15f4765ff5a5be91cae1dfdd092d/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
【基本設定】
structure: 単一の連続ショット（カットなし）
progression: 7枚の画像を順番にモーフィング
visibility: 各画像は一瞬だけ明確に認識できる（停止不要）
transition: 常に滑らかで連続的
style: シネマティック、高精細、ダイナミック、フリッカーなし
【プロンプト本体】
<<<Image1>>> から開始。
映像は完全に途切れのない1ショットで進行し、<<<Image1>>>  → <<<Image2>>>  → <<<Image3>>>  → <<<Image4>>>   → <<<Image5>>>   → <<<Image6>>>  → <<<Image7>>>  の順に連続的に変形していく。
全体は静止的ではなく、カメラが常に動き続けるダイナミックな映像の中でモーフィングが発生する。
ただし被写体の認識性は維持し、構図が破綻しないように制御する。
各画像は流れの中で一瞬だけ明確に視認できるピーク状態を持つが、停止やホールドはしない。
すべては連続した「動きの中の進化」として表現する。
【変形ロジック（順番固定・重複禁止）】
<<<Image1>>>  → <<<Image2>>>  ：
カメラが前方へスムーズにプッシュインしながら変形開始
輪郭 → パーツ → 色 → 質感の順で段階的に変化
微細な粒子分解 → 再構築
<<<Image2>>>  → <<<Image3>>>  ：
カメラが横方向へ流れるトラッキング移動
光の走査（ライトスキャン）により構造が書き換わる
発光ラインが流れ、形状が連続的に変化
※粒子表現は禁止
<<<Image3>>>  → <<<Image4>>>  ：
カメラが被写体の周囲を回り込むようにオービット移動
空間歪み・レンズワープにより形状が引き伸ばされながら変形
<<<Image4>>>  → <<<Image5>>>  ：
カメラがやや引きながら視点を変える（軽いドリーアウト＋角度変化）
被写体が液体のように溶け、流れながら再形成される
<<<Image5>>>   → <<<Image6>>>  ：
カメラが一瞬加速し、動きに勢いをつける
被写体が破片化し、空間に散った後、再び集まり新しい形へ再構築
<<<Image6>>>  → <<<Image7>>>  ：
カメラが再び中心へ寄りながら安定化
エネルギーが中心に収束し、光と波動によって最終形態へ統合される
【カメラ挙動（重要）】
・常に動いているが制御された動き
・使用可能：
  - プッシュイン / プルアウト
  - 横トラッキング
  - オービット（回り込み）
  - 軽いパース変化
・禁止：
  - 急激なブレ
  - 被写体ロスト
  - 不自然なジャンプ
【制約（重要）】
・カット編集禁止（完全1ショット）
・同一エフェクトの再使用禁止
・フリッカー、ノイズ、破綻禁止
・被写体の位置・スケールは大きく崩さない
・各画像は必ず一度は明確に視認できる状態を作る
・すべての変化は連続的かつ意味のある構造変形であること
【強化キーワード】
dynamic camera movement
cinematic motion flow
smooth continuous morphing
temporal coherence
high detail preservation
consistent subject identity
seamless transformation flow
```

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/e3f03f149bf3dca09cb8fa4147a2e21f/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/e3f03f149bf3dca09cb8fa4147a2e21f/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

Style: Ultra-realistic industrial timelapse
Pacing: Extremely fast (hyperlapse feel)
Camera: Mostly fixed with slight cinematic motion (slider/drone feel)
Lighting: Bright factory lights, metallic reflections
Audio: Captivating cinematic electronic/industrial music (no dialogue)

[00:00–00:03] — Bare Frame

Shot 1 (wide, static)

Empty car chassis suspended on assembly line
Conveyor begins moving

Workers enter frame rapidly (timelapse speed)
Tools flashing, sparks briefly

[00:03–00:06] — Structure Builds

Shot 2 (slight side angle)

Doors, internal components appear quickly
Technicians blur in motion

Robotic arms assisting (fast, precise movements)
Parts snapping into place rapidly

[00:06–00:09] — Complexity Grows

Shot 3 (closer view)

Wiring, dashboard, engine components installed

Hands moving at hyper speed
Panels closing, interior forming

[00:09–00:12] — Exterior Completion

Shot 4 (dynamic angle)

Body panels attach
Wheels snap into place

Car begins to look complete
Motion blur emphasizes speed

[00:12–00:15] — Final Form

Shot 5 (hero shot)

Fully assembled car rolls forward

Lights flick on
Clean, finished vehicle

End moment:

Camera holds briefly as car exits frame
```

{
  "title": "Stylized 3D Barbershop Transformation Sequence",
  "style": "Stylized 3D animation with exaggerated cartoon proportions, cinematic martial-arts-inspired choreography, rhythmic musical energy, ultra-smooth motion, expressive physics",

  "characters": {
    "dr_eraser": {
      "description": "Lean, almost skeletal barber-scientist with long fingers and oversized glasses that slip down his nose. Wears a bright yellow lab coat filled with strange tools (mini vacuum, magnifying glass, combs, razors, quirky gadgets).",
      "movement_style": "step → pause → spin, precise, calm, orchestral control over chaos"
    },
    "patient_plush": {
      "description": "Huge, soft, teddy-bear-like client with wild messy hair, extremely long drooping beard, and a stained oversized sweater.",
      "emotion": "nervous, trembling, comically overwhelmed, eyes tracking every movement"
    }
  },

  "environment": {
    "location": "Whimsical cartoon barbershop",
    "details": "Oversized mirrors reflecting exaggerated motion, warm golden lighting, steam curling like soft clouds, gleaming tools, hair accumulating like fluffy clouds"
  },

  "mood": "Absurd precision vs comedic fear; controlled elegance vs chaotic nervous energy",

  "timeline": [
    {
      "time": "0:00-0:02",
      "shot": "Close-up",
      "action": "Patient Plush shown with wild hair and massive beard. Dr. Eraser dramatically pulls oversized scissors, spins them on finger, snaps toward camera. Coat flares like wings. Plush reacts in exaggerated shock."
    },
    {

cinematic, heavy action blockbuster film, 日本の都市中心部、夕暮れの崩壊した大通り。巨大怪獣がビルをなぎ倒し、粉塵、火花、瓦礫、黒煙が舞う中、日本の女子高生が制服姿で必死にカメラへ向かって走る。Cut 1 (0.0s-2.5s): low angle tracking shotで女子高生を正面から後退しながら追う。髪とスカートが激しくなびき、背後では怪獣の足音で地面が揺れ、車が横転し、窓ガラスが砕ける。顔は恐怖の中にも覚悟が宿る。Cut 2 (2.5s-3.7s): 足元close-up。走る一歩ごとに黒い金属フレームとピンクの発光ラインが脚へ展開、太腿から脛、ブーツまで高速装着。火花と微細なエネルギー粒子、mechanical transformation。Cut 3 (3.7s-4.8s): 手元close-up。腕を振る動きに合わせて前腕、手首、指先へ装甲が巻き付くように形成され、黒い装甲の隙間をピンクのlight stripが走る。Cut 4 (4.8s-6.0s): 腹部と胸元close-up。腹部インナー、胸部アーマー、肩ユニットが順にロックされ、呼吸に合わせて中心コアがピンクに脈動。rack focusで装甲のディテールを見せる。 Cut 5 (6.0s-7.0s): 頭部close-up。髪が舞う中、ヘルメットが左右と後方から展開してフェイスラインを包み、最後にバイザーが発光しながら閉じる。eyes visible through translucent visor。whip panで変身完了。 Cut 6 (7.0s-8.8s): wide shot。変身した彼女が高速で数歩走った後、地面をえぐる急ブレーキで火花と破片を散らし、身体をひねって怪獣へ正対。片手を前に突き出し、手の甲の装置にピンクの球体エネルギーが渦を巻いて収束、周囲の瓦礫を吸い寄せる。 Cut 7 (8.8s-10.5s): over-the-shoulderから怪獣を捉え、彼女が無言で一気にエネルギー弾を発射。極太のピンクの衝撃波が一直線に走り、怪獣の胸部を貫通。 Cut 8 (10.5s-12.0s): 超大型爆発。怪獣が木っ端微塵に吹き飛び、破片と煙が空へ舞い、巨体が崩れ落ちる。最後はhero shot、背中越しに爆炎を受けて立つ黒とピンクのパワードスーツ姿の女子高生。dramatic backlight, debris, heat haze, high contrast, realistic destruction, dynamic motion blur, no BGM, no dialogue

1990年代美国曼哈顿豪华证券公司开放式办公大厅，数百名穿西装的年轻男性经纪人密密麻麻站满整个空间，美国国旗悬挂四周，彩带在空中飘落，整个大厅陷入一种宗教仪式般的集体狂热。
00:00-00:04 宽画幅全景推进镜头：一名西装革履、气场强悍的中年男主角站在办公桌顶端，双臂张开振臂高呼，大声喊出："I am not leaving! We are not leaving!" 数百名员工在他脚下疯狂回应，挥舞手臂、击打桌面、互相拥抱，大厅轰鸣震颤。手持摄影强力推向人群，临场压迫感扑面而来。
00:04-00:09 快速剪辑切换：男主角胸部以上特写，汗水微湿，眼神燃烧，嘴唇大力喊出："They want to take it all away from you — ARE YOU GONNA LET THEM?!" 台词落点切换员工特写——一张张年轻的脸扭曲在极度亢奋之中，有人流泪，有人撕开领带，有人跳上桌子嚎叫着回应："NO!!!"
00:09-00:15 男主角单手猛拍胸口，另一只手高举拳头，低声而用力地说出最后一句话："This is who we are." 镜头从特写骤然拉开为全景——数百人的大厅在同一瞬间爆发出最高潮的呐喊，彩带倾泻而下，镜头微微仰拍男主角的剪影逆光矗立在人群顶端，定格在那种英雄与癫狂并存的高燃瞬间。
```

Handheld shoulder-mounted camera, natural shake, slight autofocus breathing, no stabilization.

Opening frame: a quiet residential street in late afternoon, soft golden sunlight, long shadows across parked cars. Ambient sound: distant traffic, wind, faint birds.

The camera slowly walks forward along the sidewalk.

At the 2-second mark, a black SUV suddenly enters frame at high speed from the left — tires screeching, suspension compressing unevenly as it loses control.

The vehicle clips a parked red sedan — the impact is abrupt and messy, metal folding naturally, glass shattering outward in uneven fragments.

No slow motion — everything happens in real time.

The red car is pushed violently onto the curb, its front end crumpling with realistic deformation.

Airbags deploy with a muffled pop.

The camera operator instinctively steps back — slight stumble, frame dips, then recovers.

Smoke begins to rise from the SUV’s engine bay.

Sound design: raw — crunch of metal, tire friction, glass, no cinematic exaggeration.

Final frame: both cars at rest, subtle ticking sounds, no dramatic music.

Style: documentary realism, imperfect framing, natural lighting, no visual effects, 4K.
```

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/8bdc37926c17cc6ebbf29cc1bab33cc6/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/8bdc37926c17cc6ebbf29cc1bab33cc6/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
Create a 12-second ultra-cinematic action scene with strong realism, perfect character consistency, realistic motorcycle physics, dramatic suspense, and seamless time-freeze storytelling.

MAIN SUBJECT:
A black, ultra-fast superbike on a busy highway at dusk. The rider wears a full black racing suit, black gloves, and a glossy black full-face helmet with a dark visor. The bike looks aggressive, premium, aerodynamic, and extremely fast.

STYLE:
hyper-realistic, cinematic, high-speed action film, dramatic lighting, intense motion blur during speed, sharp focus during time freeze, realistic highway environment, grounded physics, premium movie look, highly detailed reflections on the black motorcycle and helmet, 4K cinematic composition.

CAMERA:
dynamic tracking shots, low-angle pursuit shots, fast push-in, slight handheld vibration during speed, then absolute stillness when time stops, dramatic close-up on the rider’s duplicate body after separation, direct eye contact with camera, then instant return to violent real-time motion.

TIMELINE:

0.0s - 1.5s
A black superbike races through dense highway traffic at insane speed. The rider aggressively weaves between cars, overtaking everyone. Cinematic low front-side tracking shot, sparks of reflected city lights, intense speed sensation, realistic motion blur, danger rising.

1.5s - 3.0s
The motorcycle keeps accelerating. Cars are passed one after another. Camera shifts between a rear chase shot and a low side shot near the spinning wheels. The rider looks fully focused, body leaning with precision, the bike slicing through traffic like a missile.

3.0s - 4.2s
A large cargo truck suddenly appears directly ahead in the rider’s lane. The truck feels massive and unavoidable. Camera rapidly pushes in toward the front collision line. Tension peaks. The motorcycle is about to crash head-on.

4.2s - 5.0s
At exactly 1 centimeter before impact, time stops completely. Absolute stillness. The whole world freezes: truck, traffic, dust, reflections, fabric folds, everything suspended in place. No crash is shown yet. The motorcycle and the original rider body remain frozen on the bike in the exact pre-impact position.

5.0s - 7.5s
A second version of the rider — an identical physical duplicate, implying the rider’s spirit or soul separated from the body — calmly steps off the frozen motorcycle while the original body remains motionless on the bike. The duplicate removes the helmet. Under the helmet is the exact same rider’s face. Expression: shocked, confused, darkly comedic disbelief. He walks one or two steps toward camera through the frozen world.

7.5s - 11.5s
Medium close-up. The duplicate turns directly to the viewer, breaking the fourth wall. He looks straight into the lens and says clearly in English:
“Ohh shitt. I think I’m dead.”
Natural lip sync, natural facial performance, subtle panic mixed with disbelief. Keep the original body still frozen on the bike in the background to reinforce the visual reveal. Do not show gore.

11.5s - 12.0s
Without warning, time instantly resumes. Everything snaps back into motion at once. The duplicate disappears the moment time restarts. The motorcycle collides violently with the truck in a sudden brutal impact. Show the crash only at the final moment, extremely fast and shocking, cinematic debris burst, hard cut to impact.

Do not show the actual crash before time stops.
The audience must only realize the rider is dead when the duplicate steps off the frozen bike.
The original rider body must remain on the motorcycle while the duplicate walks away.
The duplicate must be visually identical to the rider.
No gore, no blood, no exposed injuries.
Keep the emotional tone: suspense first, then surreal dark humor, then sudden impact.
Preserve one continuous cinematic sequence with seamless transitions.
Prioritize realism, continuity, dramatic tension, and precise timing.

Create a 4-second cinematic public service announcement. The camera moves smoothly and confidently forward through a beautiful open sky with clean white clouds, soft sunlight, and a few birds flying naturally in the distance. The movement feels calm, cool, elevated, and powerful. No people, no vehicles, no buildings, no road, no extra objects. Minimal, elegant, emotional public safety tone.

At the end of the shot, display only this English text clearly in the sky, centered and cinematic:
“Don’t be fast, ride safe.”

Use a deep, old male voice with a strong, calm, authoritative tone, like a serious public service announcement narrator. The voice says exactly:
“Don’t be fast, ride safe.”

Style: ultra-cinematic, realistic sky, clean atmosphere, subtle inspirational feeling, premium PSA look, smooth motion, strong readability, no clutter, no subtitles other than the main message, no watermark.
```

5、远景 湖畔青石上，一位青年人独坐，身形安静，背景是澄澈的湖水与远处的绿树，画面静谧 缓慢推近 纯音乐轻柔响起，微风声 
6 特写 青年人的眼部特写，眼底带着淡淡的忧郁，眼神温柔又怀念，望向湖面的方向 固定特写镜头 无额外音效，纯音乐为主
7、中景 顺着青年人的目光，湖面之上，孩童划着小船嬉闹，船桨划开湖水，泛起层层涟漪 镜头缓缓摇向湖面 孩童嬉闹声、船桨划水声

15.0s sequence. A massive white tiger with luminous blue markings along its fur stalks through the bamboo forest while a colossal black panther with glowing amber eyes circles in the shadows. Handheld ground-level tracking through the bamboo forest, occasionally catching the fight reflected in rain puddles before snapping focus back to the animals as they burst through the foliage.

Photorealistic fur simulation, volumetric rain particles, ray-traced reflections on wet ground, cinematic moonlight, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, 8K.

### 522. 电影级 Lamborghini 品牌创意广告视频生成提示词

**Author**: [John](https://x.com/johnAGI168)  **Date**: 2026-03-31  **Language**: zh

> 一份为 Seedance 2.0 准备的详细、多片段提示词，旨在生成电影级、高冲击力的 Lamborghini 品牌创意广告视频。该提示词设定了第一人称高速追逐视角，强调从公牛原始力量到 Lamborghini 机械雕塑感及激进线条的过渡，并对 15 秒时间轴内的视觉风格、场景转场和声音设计给出了具体指令。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/6221a102aa45f3bed7ba89c7b78dc130/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/6221a102aa45f3bed7ba89c7b78dc130/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
电影级兰博基尼品牌创意广告，超写实，第一人称高速追随镜头，极强视觉冲击，丝滑连续运镜，整体气质高级、冷酷、极具侵略性。打造一支简约但攻击性极强的第一人称高速穿梭广告。不要低质赛博变形，不要直接把整头公牛生硬变成车，而是通过局部特写、反光、结构线条与视觉转场，把公牛的原始力量与爆发感自然转译成兰博基尼的机械雕塑感、空气动力学和极限速度。全程无背景音乐，仅保留高质量拟音与空间音效。整体时长15秒内，每3秒必须有明显视觉升级，避免单镜头平淡拖沓。
【0-3s】黑暗与深黑金属质感空间中，一头通体深黑、肌肉线条极其清晰、皮肤表面带有克制金属冷光的狂暴公牛突然高速冲出。镜头以第一人称紧贴公牛头部侧前方高速追随，几乎擦着牛角、额头骨线、颈部肌肉和肩背起伏前冲。开场必须有极强贴脸压迫感，不要平拍，不要普通奔跑镜头，要像速度和力量直接顶到镜头前，风压扑面，画面极简，只保留少量冷白高光、黑色阴影、空气压迫感与速度残影。
【3-5s】镜头突然前压加速，极近距离推进到公牛眼部与牛角根部特写，眼神中带有冰冷攻击性，反光里出现一道锋利的冷白光刃、橙色能量余辉与金属切面高光。利用牛角弧线、眼部反光和骨骼结构做无缝转场，瞬间衔接到兰博基尼前灯、楔形车鼻与锋利折线的局部特写。这个转场必须丝滑、极快、高级，像兰博基尼本来就潜伏在公牛的力量结构里。
【5-8s】进入兰博基尼车头与前灯世界后，镜头继续第一人称高速前冲，贴着车头侧前方掠过锐利灯组、低趴前舱盖、切削感极强的前脸折面、进气口与楔形轮廓。镜头沿着车身肩线高速滑行，延续刚才贴着公牛肌肉与骨线前冲的惯性，让生物的爆发结构自然过渡成机械曲面与刀锋折线。整体色彩以兰博基尼标志性的亮黄或哑黑主车身为主，搭配黑色阴影、冷白金属高光与少量橙色热能反光，克制、高级、危险。
【8-11s】镜头继续加速，掠过车侧锋利曲面，俯冲冲向轮毂与轮胎，高速贴地穿梭。轮毂旋转、刹车卡钳、碳纤维侧裙、空气通道、车门切线、尾部空气动力学结构依次闪现。运镜要像被一股不可控的暴力速度拖拽着向前，连续俯冲、绕侧、贴地前压、从车身折面和缝隙边缘擦过，维持极强第一视角爽感。镜头语言强调机械兽性的压迫感，不要温和，不要优雅游走，要像一台暴怒的超级跑车在撕开空气。
【11-13s】镜头再一次快速前冲，整个兰博基尼车身在速度中被完整建立，楔形低趴比例、锐利灯组、夸张进气结构、车侧雕刻曲面、宽大轮组与极具攻击性的姿态全部清晰成型。镜头可短暂沿车顶或车侧高速掠行，再拉到车头侧前方，完成最后一次动势积累。要让整辆车像一头真正完成机械觉醒的公牛，力量感和品牌识别同时拉满。
【13-15s】镜头收于低机位车头侧前方英雄镜头，一辆完整的兰博基尼超级跑车稳定前冲或刚刚定格，车身极低、极宽、极锋利，像刀锋一样切开空间。车漆反光冷酷克制，背景只保留少量赛道热浪、空气流线、轮胎残影和速度余波。结尾必须短、狠、有压迫感，像在宣告：原始野性，最终被锻造成兰博基尼的速度机器。
音效设计：开场使用低频能量脉冲、公牛沉重踏地、鼻息、皮肤掠风、贴脸风切与空气压缩声；推进到眼部与牛角时加入一记极细锐、极克制的空气收束与金属光刃转场音；进入兰博基尼局部后强化金属掠风、车漆表面气流滑过、轮毂旋转、碳纤维震颤、刹车系统轻鸣、灯组唤醒与空间whoosh；结尾突出轮胎压地、车体稳定落位、空气被切开的余震和低频收束感。全程不要背景音乐。
特殊控制：锁定品牌气质为兰博基尼式冷酷、锋利、侵略性、机械兽性和极限速度美学；镜头必须连续丝滑；每段都要有明确视觉升级；动作合理，转场自然，无卡顿无跳变；不要低质赛博朋克，不要廉价机甲变形感，不要普通跑车宣传片质感，必须像顶级超跑品牌的高端创意广告。
```

**Author**: [頓花聖太郎｜YAMI](https://x.com/tonka1981jp)  **Date**: 2026-03-31  **Language**: en

> 这是一个为 Seedance 2.0 设计的详细多镜头提示词，用于创作电影预告片风格的视频。该提示词明确了摄像机运动、场景过渡（从插画到写实）以及整体风格参数。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/90bb0e183e1dac0008c30a786b52afdf/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/90bb0e183e1dac0008c30a786b52afdf/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
[0s–3s]: （ image1 ）A continuous slow push-in that never stops — zooming toward the center of a 19th-century Grimm-style storybook illustration of a deep dark spruce forest, As the camera moves closer, the illustration begins to malfunction, The trees sway in a wind that should not be possible inside a drawing. 

[3s–5.5s]: ( image2 ) The zoom continues without interruption. The illustrated begins to soften and dissolve from the center outward, as if a mist is seeping through the paper and replacing the drawing from within. As the camera keeps pushing forward, this zone of realism expands outward in a controlled, organic spread. The warm cream-sepia illustration gradually drains away into cold desaturated blue-green. The drawn surface at the edges briefly wavers and thins like damp paper giving way to moisture, then quietly dissolves into the same realistic forest texture. No abrupt morphing, no multiple competing distortions — just a single eerie replacement, as if the illustration is being overtaken by a real forest through a veil of mist. By 5.5 seconds, the camera is moving fully inside the real forest, and the drawing has completely vanished. 

[5.5s–11s]: ( image3 ) The forward motion gently eases into a continuous upward drift without a cut, as if the camera is being lifted through the real forest in one smooth arc. It rises between the trunks and passes through the lower branches, gradually clearing the canopy — not soaring too high, but just enough to reveal the breadth of the dark Nordic forest under flat grey light. The motion remains calm and deliberate, with a subtle floating quality, allowing the forest to breathe onscreen. The camera then begins a slow, natural transition from vertical ascent into a shallow backward glide, as if searching for the road beyond the trees. 

[11s–15s]: ( image4 ) The same movement continues seamlessly. The camera glides forward and gently descends out of the forest edge toward the road, settling into a low eye-level perspective near the tarmac. In one unbroken motion, it arrives at an extreme wide shot with the horizon stable and the road stretching dead straight into a grey-white vanishing point. The same boxy vintage sedan is already in frame, driving steadily away, growing smaller in the mist. Fallen pine needles drift faintly across the wet surface. The mist thickens gradually ahead. 

Global style: 35mm tungsten film, anamorphic, fine grain, cinematic. Desaturated blue-green midtones, crushed blacks, flat overcast diffusion. Smooth continuous camera motion, sharp details, stable horizon, natural proportions. First two shots transition from antique illustration warmth to cold cinematic realism. No text, no typography, no digital effects.
```

Mechanical hum. 1-3s: CU hand. Right palm up, fingers spread. Red energy particles spiral inward, condensing into a sword hilt, circuit textures forming. Energy hum. 3-4s: Side CU. Hand grips hilt — red blade erupts upward, particles solidifying into translucent blade. Fully armored warrior in Imagen2Element-type red suit turns forward. Explosive hum. 4-5s: Behind MS. Warrior with sword at edge of industrial platform. Six black chitinous creatures appear in fog, red eyes glowing in pairs. Camera pulls back revealing encirclement. Shrieks. 5-6s: Low angle. Warrior combat stance. Six red eye-pairs in fog. Crane frames and cables above. Boots stamp ground. Sword hum rises. 6-7s: First creature charges. Warrior meets it — horizontal slash through midsection, creature flung 3m into railing, bending it. Red arc trail lingers. Camera side-tracks full sequence. Shell tear + metal impact sounds. 7-8s: Second creature from left — backhand slash severs forelimb, red sparks trailing. Third attacks from right — warrior spin-kicks it into the fourth, both tumble off frame. Camera orbits rapidly. Severed limb + kick impact + collision sounds. 8-9s: CU Imagen2helmet faceplate splattered with black fluid. Heavy filtered breathing. Red sword light on metallic surfaces. 9-10s: Fifth creature ambushes from behind. Warrior reverse-grips sword, thrusts backward through creature's chest, red light exits its back. Spins and flings impaled creature into the sixth. Both vanish into fog. Camera tracks fling trajectory. Piercing + screech + distant collision sounds. 10-11s: Overhead FS. Battlefield — six creatures down, missing limbs, pierced. Black fluid on metal floor, bent railings. Warrior center, sword dripping red droplets. Silence. Creaking echo, droplets hissing. 11-12s: Low CU. Red armored boots stepping through black fluid, blue-red reflections. Heavy footsteps. Metal floor begins violently trembling. Warrior stops. Camera rises to helmet. Deep tremor — massive footsteps approaching like earthquakes. 12-13s: Front MS. Warrior raises head. Two enormous red lights ignite in fog — ten times wider than creatures' eyes. Massive black silhouette emerges, head reaching crane frames, 10x warrior's size. Sword hum rises. Camera ascends revealing Boss scale. Seismic thuds, cables rattling, structures groaning. 13-14s: ECU helmet faceplate — black fluid and moisture on metallic plates. Boss reflected: massive chiti

![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/91835c42f75618d5c93d88639fa85664/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
荒凉灰色沙滩全景平视固定，迷雾从背景深处向前蔓延，哥特式建筑轮廓在迷雾中若隐若现，沙滩地面覆盖着细碎的灰色砾石与焦黑残骸，整体色调 极低饱和度冷灰压抑。仿生女侠（白色正装西服、银色机械颈甲与义臂、黑色马尾、金色齿轮耳环、红唇，五官电影级写实全程稳定不变形）立于画面中央，西服被海风缓慢鼓起，银色义臂握持法杖 垂立，法杖顶端三个圆环燃烧橙红色能量，能量光芒将女侠正面白色西服染成暖橙色轮廓光，低沉史诗垫乐在宽阔音场中缓缓铺开，能量燃烧滋滋声与沉重呼吸感交织。 镜头后撤，女侠银色义臂猛然将法杖击向沙地，冲击力激起大量灰色沙尘向四周爆散，沙尘在侧逆光中形成半透明金色尘云，三个橙红能量环脱离法杖顶端悬浮于半空并迅速加速旋转，每个圆环旋转时拖出完整的橙红光尾残影，女侠义臂猛然高举示意出击，斗篷随举臂动作猛然向后展开，马尾发丝被冲击气流向前掀起，法杖撞地沉重轰响与金属震动声、狂风卷沙声同步轰入。 仰视特写快速推进，女侠银色义臂食指向上空猛然挥动，金色火焰在精密金属指尖跳跃燃烧，蓝白电弧沿义臂关节向上蔓延至指尖与火焰交融，背景中巨大机械结构开始崩塌，金属构件在火光中翻滚坠落，指尖划过空气的尖锐呼啸声与高频能量汇聚嗡鸣声骤然刺入。 全景快速横移追踪，第一个巨大能量圆环如飞锯般以极高转速在空中划出完整橙红火光弧线，弧线尾迹在灰暗天空中形成持续发光的轨迹，瞬间切入一艘巨型钢铁飞船的侧翼装甲，切入瞬间装甲板沿切割线从内向外炸裂，橙红熔浆从切口向外喷涌，锯片切割金属的刺耳摩擦声与火花四溅爆裂声将音场撕裂。 俯视追踪镜头压顶，能量圆环穿透侧翼继续切入飞船核心舱室，核心被贯穿瞬间引发连环爆炸，第一波爆炸呈球形膨胀，第二波沿舰体纹路纵向撕裂，金属碎片伴随浓黑烟柱与红色火光向四周高速扩散，金属撕裂声与远处低音轰鸣交织成压顶音浪。 中景平视固定，第二个能量圆环呼啸飞向地面一台巨大双足步行机甲 ，圆环在飞行轨迹中旋转产生的橙色光尾与阴暗背景形成极强冷暖对比，画面色彩饱和度在此刻骤然拉高，能量环高速盘旋的低频嗡鸣声在画面中持续震荡。 仰视中景震动，能量圆环精准击中机甲左膝关节核心，巨大火球从关节内部向外爆发，爆炸冲击波将机甲整个上半身向后推移，火星瀑布从爆炸点向四周喷溅覆盖半径十米，镜头随冲击剧烈震动，沉重金属撞击声与机甲受损电火花连续爆裂声在震动中轰然压入。 全景侧移，机甲 右膝随后被第三个能量圆环击中彻底瘫痪，庞大躯体在两膝连续被毁后向右侧缓缓倾倒，倾倒过程中装甲板持续脱落，哥特式尖顶建筑在迷雾背景中随机甲倒塌的震动而轮廓颤动，机甲彻底倒地的沉闷巨响与瓦砾坠落声由近及远散开，BGM节奏在此刻推至第一阶段高潮。
```

### 552. 高速电影级蛛丝摆荡动作场景

**Author**: [おのふみ| 3D×動画生成AI](https://x.com/onofumi_AI)  **Date**: 2026-03-29  **Language**: ja

> 这是一个为 Seedance 2.0 设计的、高度详细的多段式提示词，旨在生成超写实、电影级的高速动作视频。场景描绘了一名男性角色在黄金时刻利用高张力蛛丝在摩天大楼间摆荡并加速，强调真实的物理效果、动态运动序列（加速、跳跃、坠落、爆发式上升、再加速）以及紧凑的追踪镜头视角。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/9c46cc442f2bfd889254831d27aeba8f/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/9c46cc442f2bfd889254831d27aeba8f/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
リファレンス画像の<<<Image1>>>  を完全に維持したまま、超リアルで映画のような高速アクション動画を生成してください。

ゴールデンアワーの暖かい光に包まれた高層ビル群の中、男性がクモの糸のような高張力ウェブを使って、ビルの間を超高速で突き進むシネマティックアクション。すべての動きはビルとビルの間、外壁や窓のすぐ近く、屋上ラインより下〜ギリギリ付近で行うこと。開けた空に長時間出ないこと。

【アクション構成（重要）】

最初は“前方加速”から始まる。
<<<Image1>>>  は前方上方向の建物に向かってウェブを発射し、その張力で一気に前へ引き込まれ、ビルの隙間を一直線に超高速で突き進む。壁や窓のすぐ横をかすめながら進み、強いスピードと奥行きを見せる。

その後、勢いを乗せたまま大きくジャンプし、ビルの隙間を一気に「ボーン」と飛び越える。ここでは一瞬だけ開けた空間に出るが、すぐに次のアクションへ移行する。

ジャンプ後、キャラクターは一度バランスを崩し、落下し始める。重力に引かれて急激に下へ落ちるリアルな落下を描写すること。ここで一瞬のスリルを作る。

落下中、<<<Image1>>>  は即座に上方向の建物の縁や構造物に向かってウェブを発射し、空中で引っ掛ける。その瞬間、強烈な張力によって体が一気に上方向へ引き上げられ、爆発的に上昇する。

その後、再び前方に向かってウェブを発射し、前進加速へ戻る。

ウェブの使用回数は全体で2〜3回に抑え、1つ1つのアクションをしっかり見せること。

【動きの特徴】
すべての動きは慣性、重力、張力に基づいたリアルな物理挙動にすること。減速やホバリングは禁止。常にスピードの流れが途切れず、「加速 → 跳躍 → 落下 → 爆発的上昇 → 再加速」という明確な緩急を作る。

【身体表現】
ウェブを発射する瞬間、片腕を鋭く前方または上方に突き出す。加速中は体が引っ張られて伸び、脚は後方へ流れる。ジャンプ時は全身で勢いを乗せ、落下時は重力に従い自然に崩れる。引き上げ時は体が一気に上へ持ち上がるダイナミックな動きにする。

【カメラ】
カメラは基本的に前進方向の追従ショットを維持し、キャラクターの後方または近距離から追いかける。常に奥へ進む動きを強調し、スピードとパースの変化を最大化する。サイドアングルは使用しない。

【演出】
ガラス外壁の反射、流れる窓のライン、強いモーションブラー、風圧による服の揺れ、光のフレアを活用し、圧倒的なスピードと没入感を演出する。壁との距離は常に近く、衝突ギリギリのスリルを強調する。

【感情】
集中、興奮、アドレナリン、自信、そして一瞬の危機（落下）からのリカバリーによる高揚感を表現する。

全体として、超リアル、シネマティック、高速直進、強い奥行き、緩急のあるアクション、物理的リアリズムを重視すること。
```

图片1
的身影，他身穿破损白色长袍，外覆精致银色龙纹机械肩甲、颈甲和机械臂铠，手持镜头从低角度向前推进，原本蹲伏在破旧轿车车顶的武士猛然绷紧全身，白色长袍下的肌肉紧绷，双脚（战靴）狠狠踏碎轿车引擎盖 [金属引擎盖瞬间凹陷撕裂，钣金碎片向四周飞溅，刺耳的金属扭曲声炸裂]，他猛地抬起头，眼神锐利凶狠，顶髻在动作中晃动，整个上半身向前俯冲，银色肩甲在冷光下闪烁，镜头快速跟拍，瞬间拉升战斗张力； [4-8s 节奏博弈] 武士覆盖银色机械臂铠的粗壮手臂狠狠砸向轿车车身，连续的重击带着毁灭性的蛮力，镜头快速摇移跟拍每一次重击，第一拳砸烂车前挡风玻璃 [钢化玻璃瞬间呈蛛网状炸裂，无数玻璃碎屑喷涌而出，车内座椅被拳风掀飞]，第二记肘击狠狠撞向车身侧面 [车门钣金直接被砸穿，车轴断裂，轮胎瞬间爆胎瘪陷，车身向一侧剧烈倾斜]，武士借力翻身，强壮的双腿蹬踏车身，镜头环绕跟拍其回旋动作，全程保持动作的连贯性，无画面断裂，每一次攻击都伴随精准的物理反馈，手持镜头的轻微晃动模拟真实战斗的震撼感，灰尘在顶光中弥漫飞舞，白色长袍剧烈飘动，银色盔甲反光强烈； [8-12s 巅峰对垒] 镜头切换为 360 度环绕运镜，同时开启升格慢动作，展现武士的巅峰力量爆发，武士汇聚全身力量，双拳并拢狠狠向下砸向已经严重变形的轿车，全身肌肉线条在慢动作中极致绷紧，青筋暴起，银色机械肩甲和臂铠在冷光中泛着寒芒，面容坚毅短须，顶髻武士表情极度凶狠，拳锋与车身接触的瞬间，极致的破坏力爆发 [整个轿车车身被彻底砸扁，金属框架完全弯折断裂，油箱破裂，汽油混合着机油喷涌而出，地面碎石与金属碎片被冲击波掀飞至半空，灰尘形成环形气浪向四周扩散]，慢动作极致展现力量爆发的每一个细节，布料与金属物理模拟极致； [12-15s 终极定格] 升格结束，镜头快速甩镜拉回低角度仰拍，武士从砸扁的轿车上猛然站直身躯，双脚踏在彻底报废的车身上，仰天发出震慑的怒吼，全身肌肉紧绷，破损的白色长袍在冲击波的余风中猎猎作响 [地面残留的汽油被摩擦火花点燃，微弱的火焰在车身底部蔓延，周围墙体被飞溅的碎片砸出密集的凹痕，灰尘缓缓落下，整个地下停车场回荡着金属余震的嗡鸣]，最终镜头定格在武士极具压迫感的威慑姿态，全局参数：8K 超清画质，电影级暗黑冷色调调色，极端光影对比，全布料与肌肉运动物理模拟，手持镜头模拟真实战斗的震撼感，全程动作连贯无断裂，高细节银色机械盔甲反光与白色长袍动态飘动

### 559. 穿越东南亚夜市的“不可能”运镜

**Author**: [Changning Liu](https://x.com/ChangningL29508)  **Date**: 2026-03-29  **Language**: en

> 这是一份详细的多镜头提示词，用于制作一段 15 秒连续的、高难度的“不可能”运镜视频，场景设定为拥挤的东南亚夜市。重点在于呈现从地面到空中的写实电影级摄影效果、湿润石板路的倒影以及强烈的橙红色灯光氛围。提示词详细规定了每个镜头的运镜方式、音频提示和情感节奏。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/39ca868c9323cfeae8e204bdfdc4e6b8/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/39ca868c9323cfeae8e204bdfdc4e6b8/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
FORMAT: 15s / single continuous impossible camera move / no dialogue
STYLE: Dense Southeast Asian night market, wet stone, steam and fire, orange lantern light, photorealistic ground-to-aerial cinematic 8K
Shot 01 (0:00–2:00): Camera starts at ankle level. Forest of feet — sandals, bare feet, flip flops on glistening wet stone. Market sounds overwhelming. Camera weaves between legs like water. Audio: Wet footsteps, distant vendor calls, sizzling.

Shot 02 (2:00–3:30): Camera rises slowly past steaming woks. A gas flame bursts at exact eye level — camera briefly engulfed in orange fire then emerges through it, uncut. Audio: Gas flame WHOMP. Wok sizzle. Shot 03 (3:30–5:00): Camera weaves through hanging lanterns at mid-height, skimming past them like a moth navigating. Red and orange light strobing across the lens. Audio: Lantern chains clinking. Crowd murmur. Shot 04 (5:00–6:30): Camera dips suddenly under a low table. A child has fallen asleep on a bag under here. Quiet pocket of stillness inside the chaos. Camera lingers one beat. Audio: Noise muffled. Child's quiet breathing.
Shot 05 (6:30–8:00): Camera rises back up through the smoke of a charcoal grill — lens briefly obscured by smoke, then emerges above the stall canopy level. Audio: Charcoal crackle. Smoke hiss.
Shot 06 (8:00–10:00): Camera continues rising — now above rooftop level. The market reveals itself as an endless orange lantern sea stretching to the horizon. Camera tilts slowly, taking in the full scale. Audio: Market sounds fading to a low ambient hum.
Shot 07 (10:00–12:00): Camera begins descending back down — targeting a single stall at the market edge. A lone vendor counting coins. Everything closing around them. Audio: Distant vendor calls dying out one by one. Shot 08 (12:00–13:30): Camera settles at the vendor's hands. Close on coins being stacked methodically. One lantern swaying above them. Audio: Coin clinks. Wind in the lantern.
Shot 09 (13:30–15:00): Camera tilts up slowly to the vendor's face. They look up — directly into the camera. Hold. Fade to black. Audio: Last coin placed. Silence.
STYLE NOTES: Ground level feels claustrophobic and overwhelming. The aerial shot is the emotional exhale. Warm orange and red throughout — deepening to amber at the end. Wet stone reflections throughout. Real fire and real smoke, no CG substitutes. 8K.
```

A hand from the camera selects one card from the fan — the Ace of Hearts. The rabbit takes the same card and holds it clearly facing the camera. The rabbit flicks the card lightly. The Ace of Hearts begins to glow at the edges, then disintegrates into fine red and gold particles. The particles form a controlled, continuous stream with motion trails, flowing forward across the street. The camera follows the particle stream as it travels toward a large glass building facade. Upon impact, a point of light appears and expands outward in a grid-like pattern across the glass surface. The entire building facade activates, and a massive glowing Ace of Hearts forms across it, bright and clearly defined, with subtle pulsing light. After a brief hold, the giant Ace of Hearts breaks apart into particles again. The particles reverse direction, streaming back through the air toward the rabbit. The rabbit steps forward and reaches into the air, catching the incoming particles. In close-up, the particles compress and reform into a single solid playing card in the rabbit’s hand — the Ace of Hearts, unchanged. The rabbit presents the card toward the camera. The camera slowly pulls back, revealing the crowd reacting and clapping, while the city lights and reflections remain vivid in the background.

> 一份为 Seedance 2.0 准备的详细分步提示词，用于生成一段短视频，展示一只猫咪在深夜日式路边摊扮演专业拉面厨师的过程。提示词指定了电影感暖色调、浅景深、写实风格，以及烹饪过程中详细的 ASMR 音频指令。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/35810f0c2a6e76f3f7c43d7dd8b02aa7/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/35810f0c2a6e76f3f7c43d7dd8b02aa7/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
制作一个以猫咪在深夜食堂制作手作拉面为主题的短视频，电影级调色（暖色调，充满烟火气），细腻颗粒，浅景深。
主角是一只猫咪，扮演一位专业拉面师傅，形象外观严格参照【@【@图1】】。
场景设定为城市街头一家充满和式风情的深夜拉面摊位前。背景有温暖的黄色灯笼、木质吧台，以及远处模糊的街道霓虹灯。
视频内容需要按照以下步骤分镜展示：

揉面与切面： 猫咪穿着小围裙，有节奏地在撒了面粉的木质案板上揉捏面团，然后用一把锋利的面刀将面团切成均匀的细面条。

煮面与甩干： 猫咪将面条抖散投入沸腾的大锅中，几秒后用竹漏勺将面条捞起，熟练地在空中用力甩两下，将多余的水分甩干。

调汤底： 猫咪拿着一个精致的长柄勺，从熬制浓郁的白色骨汤锅里舀出一勺汤，缓缓倒入一个深蓝色的陶瓷大碗中。

摆盘： 猫咪用筷子整齐地放入煮好的面条，再依次在面条上摆放两片厚实的叉烧、半个溏心蛋、几片海苔和葱花，动作精细。

结尾： 结尾镜头猫咪师傅将这碗热气腾腾、冒着白烟的拉面轻轻推向镜头，并微微点头示意。

要求：

视频风格： 写实，画面清晰，中景。

声音（ASMR）： 整个视频不需语音旁白，但要放大：切面时的“哒哒”声、面条入水的“哗啦”声、甩干水分的“飒飒”声、热汤入碗的流动声等。

背景音乐： 背景有轻柔、舒缓的萨克斯风音乐，营造静谧的深夜氛围。
```

11–13s: The camera returns to a front-view follow shot as the character charges toward the lens at high speed, performing a sharp turn at close range, sending a massive spray of snow into the air.

13–15s: A large amount of snow powder splashes directly onto the lens, covering the screen in a white snow mist. The camera briefly loses focus before freezing, leaving a strong dynamic afterimage. The overall emphasis is on speed, cutting rhythm, realistic motion, and youthful vitality, with a bright, non-heavy aesthetic that highlights the thrill and freedom of skiing.

> 这是一个高度详细的提示词，用于生成第一人称视角的视频，模拟一只金雕在被火山摧毁的远古版纽约市中极速逃生的过程。提示词指定了超广角畸变镜头风格、剧烈的画面不稳定性，以及穿梭于倒塌石质建筑、熔岩冲击和火山灰暴中的一系列混乱闪避动作。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/a6bdca94d1ce92fba822adab24159aa1/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/a6bdca94d1ce92fba822adab24159aa1/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
A full, uncut first-person POV simulating an adult golden eagle escaping at extreme speed.

Camera style: ultra-wide distorted lens with intense edge stretching, an exaggerated sense of spatial depth and motion parallax, and a cinematic macro-like pressure effect. The camera surges forward at near-supersonic speed with violent whipping shakes, rapid dives, aggressive rolls, and chaotic aerial turbulence driven by powerful wing flaps.

The scene is set in an ancient version of New York during a catastrophic volcanic super-eruption. The skyline is reimagined as towering stone skyscrapers, primitive suspension bridges, and colossal monolithic structures. Volcanic ash storms rage as lava bombs rain from the sky, obliterating everything in their path.

The golden eagle dives at extreme speed through a massive stone archway resembling an ancient Manhattan gateway; flaming debris and collapsing towers explode outward as molten fragments strike. It spirals downward between towering structures, narrowly dodging falling stone slabs and fiery wreckage, skimming just above the ground before bursting through a collapsing avenue.

It then races through a grand, ancient Wall Street district, where colossal columns and statue-lined pathways shatter under volcanic shockwaves. Massive stone pillars snap and topple like dominoes, marble fragments scattering violently as the eagle performs sharp, chained evasive maneuvers between collapsing structures.

Next, it plunges vertically through a giant domed temple inspired by early New York architecture. The dome cracks under immense pressure, huge chunks crashing down as the eagle weaves through tight interior spaces and escapes through a ruptured wall.

The flight continues toward an ancient monumental complex resembling a primitive Statue of Liberty structure, now partially destroyed by lava impacts. The eagle darts through shattered frameworks and collapsing stone scaffolding, weaving in tight S-shaped paths through falling debris.

The camera remains violently unstable throughout, constantly shaken by shockwaves and turbulence. The atmosphere is dominated by a blood-orange volcanic sky, glowing lava trails streaking across the frame, and towering bursts of firelight. Ash, molten fragments, stone dust, and burning embers swirl chaotically around the camera.

Emotional tone: extreme, relentless, and adrenaline-surging, capturing a desperate high-speed escape through the destruction of an ancient New York.
```

> 一份为 Seedance 2.0 设计的全面且高度详细的提示词，用于生成 15 秒的电影感蒙太奇视频。包含特定的场景转场、调色、运镜及音频设计，通过对比温暖的过去与寒冷的现在，聚焦于一对情侣的情感冲突。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/d43e1071d54bc4b8fca64881299691d5/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/d43e1071d54bc4b8fca64881299691d5/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
【@图片1】（男主参考）【@图片2】（女主参考） 电影级画质，15秒，蒙太奇剪辑，无字幕，韩语对白。 开场第0秒到第1秒，胶片暖黄，过去， 阳光午后咖啡馆，她趴在桌上睡着， 他坐对面，手撑着下巴低头看她， 嘴角压不住往上扬，画面有轻微颗粒感和过曝。 硬切第1秒，冷蓝雨夜，现在， 空旷天台，他背对镜头站在雨里， 大衣被淋透紧贴着背， 一动不动，像一座被时间遗弃的石像， 暖黄到冷蓝的温度在这一帧直接断裂。 硬切回过去第2秒，夜晚便利店门口， 她拎着两杯热饮递给他一杯， 他没接，低头看她， "이거 나 주는 거야？" （这是给我的？） 她白了他一眼转头走， 他笑着跟上去，镜头跟拍两人背影走进夜色。 硬切回现在第3秒， 她站在天台入口，手握着铁门， 雨打在她肩膀上，她没动， 就这样站着看他的背影， 不知道进去还是离开。 硬切过去第4秒，极近特写， 他的手替她把耳机塞进耳朵里， 指尖在她耳侧停留了一秒， 两个人都假装没注意到。 硬切现在第5秒，极近特写， 同一双手，现在插在口袋里， 雨水顺着袖口渗进去， 手在口袋里慢慢握紧。 第6秒到第10秒全部放慢， 她终于松开铁门走进雨里， 走到他背后半米停下， 雨声很大，她的声音还是穿过来了—— "왜 연락 안 했어." （你为什么不联系我。） 他没回头，沉默了两秒， "연락하면 뭐가 달라져？" （联系了又能怎样。） 她闭上眼睛， 胸腔像被什么东西重重压住， 她再开口，声音已经在抖—— "달라지잖아. 나한테는." （会不一样的。对我来说。） 他终于转过身， 看见她脸上分不清是雨还是泪， 他的喉结滚动， 低哑开口—— "알아. 그래서 더 못 했어." （我知道。所以才更做不到。） 第10秒到第13秒叠化蒙太奇， 同一个天台同一个机位， 过去是晴天傍晚， 她站在栏杆边回头对他笑， 他大步走过去把她整个人揽进怀里， 夕阳把两个人的影子拉得很长， 现在是雨夜，同一个位置， 他站在她面前， 两个时空叠在同一帧里整整一秒， 过去她的笑和现在她的泪压在同一张脸上。 第13秒到第15秒， 他没再说话， 抬手把她的头按进自己胸口， 她撑了两秒， 手慢慢抬起来死死抓住他背后的衣服， 镜头缓缓拉到极远， 两个人缩成雨幕里一个剪影， 霓虹灯光在积水里破碎晃动， 画面渐渐静止，声音渐渐消失，黑场。 过去场景全程暖黄橙16mm胶片颗粒手持跟拍， 现在场景冷蓝黑雨水反光稳定器， 对白时镜头推进到极近特写， 叠化瞬间饱和度爆一帧然后收回冷调， 配乐在过去场景用轻吉他拨弦， 进入现在场景消音只剩雨声， 最后一句对白后大提琴单弦低沉拉响， 黑场前完全静默。
```

```
主题一：电影夜景风 - 星光幻城，共坠星河 视觉核心：赛博朋克与极致浪漫的碰撞，利用霓虹倒影与雨滴微距展现都市高级感。 9:16竖屏，写实电影质感风格，都市奢华，4K高清。 0-4秒：高位俯拍，缓缓下降。雨后的都市天台，地面是积水的黑色柏油路，如镜面般反射着远处迷离的城市霓虹灯光。唯美25岁中国新娘【偶像级别】身穿闪钻鱼尾高定婚纱，28岁帅气中国新郎身穿深色丝绒西装。两人在画面正中，手撑一把透明雨伞，在雨夜中漫步。画面呈现复古文艺电影式的电影抽帧感。 5-9秒：镜头以两人为中心做360度环绕慢镜头。新娘瓜子脸精致，野生眉，狐狸眼冷艳，高鼻梁，红唇微张；新郎下颌线分明，剑眉星目，眼神深邃。环绕过程中，天空中飘落极慢的微小雨滴（子弹时间），新郎将伞倾向新娘，自己的半边肩膀被微雨打湿。霓虹灯光在他们身后化作巨大的彩色光斑（散景效果）。 10-15秒：镜头切至特写，微微仰拍。新娘丢掉透明雨伞，雨伞在背景中缓缓下落。新娘双手环住新郎的脖子，新郎低头深情凝视。一束路灯的暖橘色轮廓光从侧面打透新娘沾着水珠的睫毛。画面定格在两人即将吻上的瞬间，背景霓虹彻底虚化为星河。 音效：远处的城市环境音、缓慢的爵士大提琴、雨滴落在伞面上的白噪音、电影感的心跳声。 禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印。
```

> 一份为 Seedance 2.0 设计的 15 秒单镜头视频提示词，聚焦于东方暗黑神话、天葬意象、巨物恐惧症以及中式超现实灾难景观。提示词详细规定了调色板、运镜方式、镜头类型（特写、后拉、广角）及音效设计，描述了从青铜钟上的落羽到巨型天葬神像缓慢升起的场景演变。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/2e93fb1c86e3af1769b120370d8d26ff/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/2e93fb1c86e3af1769b120370d8d26ff/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
15秒，一镜到底，东方黑暗神话，天葬意象，巨物恐惧，中国式超现实灾厄景观，无对白，无旁白。整体色调为冷灰、骨白、旧金、暗红，天空低压，空气中飘落大量羽毛，像雪一样持续下坠。 0:00–0:03：极近特写开场。85mm长焦微距，浅景深。骨白羽毛缓慢落在一只巨大的青铜铃铛表面，铃铛半埋在黑色冻土中，表面布满古老符纹和干裂血锈。羽毛落下时，铃铛内部传来极低频的闷响，地面细小石粒震动。冷顶光，阴影纯黑。 0:03–0:08：镜头贴地后拉并微微抬升。35mm，稳定滑行。黑色荒原上立着无数倾斜木桩与残破祭幡，地面覆盖一层羽毛。镜头掠过几只巨大的枯鹿角，它们最初像普通遗骸，随后才意识到那其实是一个更庞大存在的一部分。随着镜头继续后退，一层层暗红色祭布从地面被缓慢拉起，布面沾满灰尘、蜡油和雨蚀痕迹，边缘挂满青铜小铃。铃声极轻，却密集得令人不安。 0:08–0:12：镜头穿过一片塌陷的石门，冲出后豁然开阔。24mm广角，深焦。完整巨物现身：一尊埋伏在山谷中的天葬神像缓缓起身，身体由成百上千层沉重祭布、兽角、骨饰和巨大空洞面具组成，高度远超山脊。它起身时，成片羽毛被气流卷向天空，像倒流的大雪。远处的废弃寺庙与经幡在它脚边显得极其渺小。天空惨白，巨物上部形成压迫剪影。 0:12–0:15：镜头极慢前推。50mm。巨像胸前悬挂的巨大空面具缓缓转向镜头，面具五官空无一物，只有眼眶深处浮现极微弱暗红火点。所有铃铛同时轻响一下，羽毛骤然停止下落，画面边缘逐渐失光，黑场。音效：低频风压、远处群铃、巨大布料拖拽、最后一声空洞钟鸣后静默。
```

VFX: sand displacement from emerging structures, dust column particle systems, scale depth on the emerging cityscape, wind across the ridge surface. ```
都市時空穿越武道大片(Urban Time-Shift Martial Arts Epic)。頂級電影特效，極速剪輯節奏，強調力量、速度與守護意志的極限碰撞。視覺風格強烈對比：一方是暗影凝聚的東方巨龍能量，另一方是純白剛勁的武道氣場屏障。時空在戰鬥中撕裂重組。

【場景】
戰場從16世紀羅馬的特雷維噴泉開始——石雕神像、流動水池、燭光與月色交織；隨著戰鬥升級，空間逐漸扭曲破碎，最終延伸至21世紀的威尼斯運河——霓虹燈倒映水面，水氣與現代燈光交錯，歷史與現代重疊。

【角色】

橘貓忍者：穿黑色忍者裝束，身形敏捷，橘色毛髮在夜色中若隱若現，雙眼銳利發光，周身環繞暗影氣流。
白老虎武者：壯碩白虎，身穿跆拳道服與黑帶，肌肉線條分明，氣勢沉穩，周身環繞白色氣浪與震動波紋。

【分鏡腳本】

[00:00–00:03] 鏡頭1：古城開戰·速度試探
機位：高速滑軌＋手持混合運鏡(Dynamic Tracking + Handheld)。
畫面：特雷維噴泉前，水花飛濺。橘貓忍者瞬間消失又出現，殘影連續閃現；白老虎穩站原地，以最小動作格擋攻擊。拳腳碰撞間激起水柱與碎石，雕像表面出現裂痕。

[00:03–00:06] 鏡頭2：時空撕裂·場景轉換
機位：旋轉升空鏡頭(Spiral Rise Shot)。
畫面：兩者一次猛烈對撞，能量爆開——空間如玻璃碎裂。背景從古羅馬石雕快速扭曲，轉為威尼斯運河。水面翻湧，貢多拉劇烈晃動，霓虹燈在水中扭曲反射。
特寫：橘貓低吼，黑影氣流如煙翻騰；白虎踏水而立，腳下水面出現同心圓氣紋。

[00:06–00:11] 鏡頭3：絕技對轟·龍與氣場
機位：史詩級廣角全景(Epic Wide Shot)。
動作（同步爆發）：
橘貓忍者：雙爪結印猛然推出，暗影能量凝聚成一條巨大東方巨龍(Eastern Shadow Dragon)，龍鱗細節清晰，盤旋升空，張口咆哮，帶動水氣與霓虹光流席捲前方。
白老虎武者：雙掌前推，白色氣場屏障瞬間展開(White Martial Aura Barrier)，氣流層層擴散，如水波與震動波交織，穩定而厚重。
特效碰撞：巨龍猛烈撞擊氣場，爆發巨大衝擊波，水面炸裂升空，運河兩側建築玻璃震碎，霓虹燈閃爍失控。

[00:11–00:13] 鏡頭4：壓制與反擊
機位：快速推進鏡頭(Rapid Push-in)。
畫面：白色氣場出現裂紋，但白虎怒吼發力，肌肉繃緊，氣場瞬間反震。巨龍被撕裂一部分，黑影能量四散如煙。橘貓被震退，在水面滑行數米，濺起高牆般水浪。

[00:13–00:15] 鏡頭5：終局定格·對峙未完
機位：慢動作定格＋環繞(Freeze + Slow Orbit)。
畫面：威尼斯夜色中，水氣瀰漫。白老虎穩站水面中央，氣場緩緩收斂；橘貓半蹲於漂浮木板上，黑影氣流再次凝聚。兩者對視——戰意未熄。背景霓虹在水霧中閃爍，時空裂縫仍隱約可見，能量光點緩緩飄散。
```

### 613. 元素超级英雄激战破碎之城

**Author**: [LudovicCreator](https://x.com/LudovicCreator)  **Date**: 2026-03-28  **Language**: en

> 一个极其详细、多阶段的 Seedance 2.0 提示词，用于生成一个动态动作场景。该场景描绘了三位元素人物（闪电、火焰、冰）在一个旋转的超级风暴之下，于一座破碎的沿海特大城市上空激战。该提示词详细说明了事件序列、力量激活、镜头运动（动态环绕、快速变焦）以及色彩逻辑。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/1c7e532903d0a6f4fb90a31105a7361e/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/1c7e532903d0a6f4fb90a31105a7361e/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
Three figures suspended above a shattered coastal megacity under a rotating superstorm:

— a 30-year-old woman wreathed in living lightning, body threaded with branching electric veins, eyes glowing white-hot;

— a towering fire entity formed of molten armor and solar plasma, constantly shedding embers;

— a pale ice sovereign with crystalline skin and flowing frost structures orbiting her form.

Opening frame: medium tri-shot, all three hovering in perfect stillness, storm clouds spiraling around them — the city below already partially flooded and burning.

Hook at second two: all three activate simultaneously.

The storm wielder pulls lightning from the cloud system, the fire entity ignites into full solar output, and the ice sovereign freezes the surrounding atmosphere into expanding crystalline lattices.

The environment fractures into layered systems: lightning chains across buildings, firestorms ignite entire districts, and ice formations suspend debris mid-air.

Each character controls a domain:

— lightning creates branching shock networks across the skyline

— fire generates expanding heat waves and explosive pressure bursts

— ice locks entire sections of the battlefield into geometric suspension

Dynamic orbit camera circles the three-way collision, snap zooming into impact moments where elements clash — lightning striking frozen structures, fire vaporizing ice into explosive steam clouds.

Color logic: white-violet lightning arcs, deep orange fire cores, cobalt ice volumes — each occupying distinct zones of the frame.

Escalation builds as their powers begin interfering — thermal shockwaves fracture frozen structures, lightning supercharges vapor explosions.

Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collision point itself, plunging downward as all three forces converge into a single detonation wave that obliterates the city center.

Volumetric storm, fire, and ice particle systems interacting in real-time, cinematic destruction physics, 4K ultra-detail.

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/de202c2375b54ca5ae34f3e3359f2f1d/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/de202c2375b54ca5ae34f3e3359f2f1d/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
影片場景設定 (Global Style)
環境場景：深夜的中式古風庭院，青瓦白牆、紅燈籠隨風微晃，地面有月光與樹影交錯，整體光影帶有濃厚復古武俠電影質感。
角色形象：
橘貓（大俠）：穿著古風俠客服，披風微揚，表情兇狠中帶點憨，氣場十足。
烤鴨（書生）：穿著古代書生長袍，被繩子綁在木樁上，神情委屈又緊張，嘴巴鼓鼓的（含著黑色膠囊）。
哈士奇（醫生）：穿白袍醫生制服，戴黑框眼鏡，神情專業又帶點自信過頭的戲劇感。
道具設定：黑色膠囊（褪黑激素）含在烤鴨嘴中。
畫質要求：電影級打光，超高清 4K，動物毛髮與布料細節清晰，動作流暢，略帶慢動作強化戲劇張力。

分鏡劇情與旁白 (Script & Prompts)

鏡頭 1：武俠審訊（全景/中景）
畫面描述：左側橘貓大俠負手而立，披風隨風微動，右側烤鴨書生被綁在木樁上，嘴巴鼓起。橘貓突然上前，一掌拍在木樁旁，氣勢逼人。
動作：橘貓步步逼近，眼神凌厲。
旁白（橘貓）：
「說！為何不肯交出你嘴中的褪黑激素！」

鏡頭 2：書生鴨死守（烤鴨特寫）
畫面描述：鏡頭推近烤鴨，嘴巴緊閉，臉頰鼓起，眼神倔強又帶點慌張。
動作：烤鴨拼命搖頭，死死咬住膠囊不放。
旁白（烤鴨）：
（含糊不清）「唔唔唔！（我不能給！）」

鏡頭 3：氣氛升溫（橘貓特寫）
畫面描述：橘貓眼神一沉，緩緩抬手，武俠氣場拉滿，背景燈籠微微晃動。
動作：橘貓手指關節發出“喀喀”聲，準備動粗。
旁白（橘貓）：
「敬酒不吃，吃罰酒是吧……」

鏡頭 4：醫生突襲（動作鏡頭）
畫面描述：畫面右側突然衝出哈士奇醫生，一個滑步切入畫面，動作誇張但專業。
動作：哈士奇迅速伸出一掌，「啪！」地按在烤鴨胸口（類似急救按壓）。
音效：低沉“砰”一聲＋誇張彈出音效。

鏡頭 5：膠囊飛出（慢動作特寫）
畫面描述：慢動作鏡頭，烤鴨張嘴，「噗！」一顆黑色膠囊從口中飛出，在空中旋轉。
動作：哈士奇單手優雅接住膠囊，鏡片反光一閃。

鏡頭 6：全場愣住（反應鏡頭）
畫面描述：橘貓與烤鴨同時愣住，畫面定格一瞬，氣氛從緊張瞬間轉為荒謬。
動作：橘貓慢慢轉頭看向哈士奇。
旁白（橘貓，小聲）：
「……這也行？」

鏡頭 7：醫生結尾（哈士奇特寫）
畫面描述：哈士奇推了推眼鏡，手中夾著黑色膠囊，對鏡頭露出自信笑容，背景略微虛化。
動作：微微點頭，語氣專業又帶點得意。
旁白（哈士奇）：
「褪黑激素，不是人人都能吃。」
「最好，先問過醫師。」

鏡頭 8：收尾（全景定格）
畫面描述：三者定格，橘貓仍維持武俠姿勢但表情困惑，烤鴨一臉虛脫，哈士奇自信站中間。背景傳來幾聲夜鳥鳴叫。
動作：畫面定格＋輕微膠片顆粒效果淡出。
```

### 615. 15 秒 真人 竞争 视频 脚本

**Author**: [Feyber | Go-AI](https://x.com/woleswoosh)  **Date**: 2026-03-28  **Language**: en

> 一个详细的、多场景的提示，用于一个 15 秒的真人短视频，聚焦于两名高中生青山春树和黑泽仁司之间不断升级的竞争。该提示包含角色描述、剧情梗概以及具体的场景分解（首次交锋、集会上的对峙、走廊余波），以指导视频的生成。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/9655611bbe446297b5066c56dae8251b/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/9655611bbe446297b5066c56dae8251b/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
At Sakuragaoka High School, quiet and determined second-year student Haruki Aoyama is publicly humiliated by his nemesis Renji Kurosawa, the intimidating student council vice president, on the very first day of the new semester. What begins as a bitter rivalry fueled by hatred escalates through a high-stakes school competition where both students push each other to the breaking point. As the conflict intensifies, Haruki discovers a shocking truth. Renji's cruelty stems not from malice but from desperate resentment over a scholarship that Haruki unknowingly took, one that Renji's struggling family desperately needed. Forced to confront the gray areas between hero and villain, Haruki must decide whether to destroy his enemy or extend a hand to someone who might just need a friend. The choices he makes will determine whether their rivalry ends in friendship, mutual respect, or lasting regret.

Character:
Haruki Aoyama (Main Protagonist) - A quiet, determined second-year student at Sakuragaoka High School. He is hardworking and principled but struggles with anger and impulsiveness. His journey transforms him from a resentful victim into someone capable of empathy and forgiveness.

Renji Kurosawa (Supporting Character) - The charismatic and ruthless student council vice president who serves as Haruki's nemesis. Beneath his intimidating exterior, he hides deep pain from his family's financial struggles. He is fiercely proud and refuses to show weakness.

Miku Tachibana (Supporting Character) - Haruki's loyal childhood friend and emotional anchor. She is perceptive, strategic, and caring, often serving as the voice of reason. She knows more about the situation than she initially reveals.

Souta Himura (Supporting Character) - A laid-back classmate of Haruki who hides surprising talent beneath his carefree attitude. He becomes a key ally and is unafraid to speak hard truths when needed.

Scene 1:
The Opening 
SalvoIt is the first day of the new semester at Sakuragaoka High School. Haruki Aoyama, a quiet but determined second-year student, arrives hoping for a peaceful school year. However, his nemesis Renji Kurosawa, the charismatic and ruthless student council vice president, publicly humiliates Haruki during the opening assembly by exposing an embarrassing incident from last year. The entire school laughs, and Haruki's reputation is shattered before the year even begins. Haruki's childhood friend Miku Tachibana tries to comfort him, but Haruki is consumed by anger and a desire for payback. The seeds of an intense rivalry are sown as Renji makes it clear he intends to make Haruki's life miserable all year. Storylet: Assembly Confrontation: When Renji takes the stage during the opening ceremony, he publicly targets Haruki with a humiliating story, establishing dominance and triggering Haruki's deep resentment. Hallway Aftermath: After the assembly ends, Haruki retreats to the hallway where Miku finds him; she offers comfort but Haruki is too furious to listen, setting up his emotional state for the chapter. Rival's Warning: Renji corners Haruki near the shoe lockers and delivers a cold warning that this year will be hell for him, escalating the tension and making the conflict personal. Inner Resolve: Alone on the school rooftop after classes, Haruki clenches his fists and silently vows to fight back, establishing his motivation and determination for the story ahead.

Scene 2:
Battle Lines
The school announces a major inter-class competition — the Sakuragaoka Cultural Festival Challenge — where teams compete in academics, sports, and creative arts. Haruki and Renji end up as rival team captains. Haruki rallies his classmates, including the laid-back but surprisingly talented Souta Himura, while Renji uses his influence and intimidation to build an elite squad. As the competition heats up, both rivals push themselves to the limit. Miku serves as Haruki's strategist and emotional anchor. During the sports round, Haruki and Renji face off directly in a relay race that becomes deeply personal. Tensions reach a boiling point when Haruki notices suspicious behavior from Renji's team — possible cheating. The chapter ends at the climax of the competition, with the outcome uncertain. Storylet: Team Formation: When the competition is announced, Haruki must recruit classmates; Souta initially refuses but joins after witnessing Haruki's sincerity, forming the core team. Strategy Session: Miku organizes a late-night study and planning session at Haruki's house, where the team bonds and develops creative strategies, strengthening their resolve. The Relay Showdown: During the sports event, Haruki and Renji run the anchor leg of the relay; the crowd roars as they sprint neck-and-neck, and the raw hatred between them is visible to everyone. Suspicious Evidence: After the academic round, Haruki finds discarded answer sheets near the trash that suggest Renji's team had advance knowledge of the questions, creating a moral dilemma. Miku's Counsel: Miku pulls Haruki aside and warns him that acting on anger alone will make him no different from Renji, forcing him to reflect on his choices.

Scene 3:
Behind the Mask
After the intensity of the competition, a quiet shift begins. Haruki discovers the truth behind Renji's deep-seated hatred — last year, Haruki unknowingly took the scholarship spot that Renji desperately needed to stay in school due to his family's severe financial troubles. Renji's single mother works multiple jobs, and the scholarship was his only hope of easing her burden. The humiliation Renji inflicted on Haruki was born not from cruelty but from desperate resentment. Miku reveals she has known fragments of this story but kept silent to protect both of them. Haruki is shaken, realizing his rival's villain persona is a mask over deep pain. He visits Renji at a part-time job at a convenience store late at night and sees a completely different person — exhausted, vulnerable, and alone. The two share an uncomfortable but honest conversation under the fluorescent lights. Storylet: The Revelation: Miku finally tells Haruki the full story of Renji's family situation after the competition ends, shattering Haruki's simple view of good versus evil. Convenience Store Visit: Haruki tracks down Renji's part-time job and sees him stocking shelves alone late at night, tired and quiet, a stark contrast to his domineering school persona. The Honest Talk: Under harsh convenience store lights, Renji initially lashes out at Haruki for showing up, but eventually breaks down and admits the weight he carries, creating raw emotional vulnerability. Walking Home: The two walk home in silence through empty nighttime streets, neither fully reconciled but with a fragile new understanding forming between them.

Scene 4:
The Price of Exposure
Haruki chose to expose Renji's cheating, and the fallout is catastrophic. The school administration launches a formal investigation, and Renji faces potential expulsion. However, the investigation reveals that Renji was coerced into cheating by a third-year student who wanted to sabotage both teams for his own gain. Renji took the blame silently to protect his teammates. Haruki is horrified — his act of justice may destroy someone who was already a victim. The school is abuzz with gossip and judgment. Souta urges Haruki to fix what he started. Miku is torn between supporting Haruki and feeling that he acted too rashly. Renji, now isolated and facing the disciplinary committee, refuses to defend himself. Haruki must decide whether to step forward and tell the full truth, risking his own standing. Storylet: Investigation Fallout: The school principal announces the investigation results in a tense faculty meeting, and word spreads fast through the student body, turning Renji into a pariah overnight. Souta's Push: Souta confronts Haruki in the empty gym, telling him bluntly that exposing Re
```

参考画像はリファレンスとしてのみ使用し、スタートフレームには使用しない。バトル風アップテンポBGMあり、効果音あり。開始直後に以下のカットに切り替える。

超高速トランジションで画面切りかえ。高速で空間が崩れ落ちる。

一瞬のホワイトアウトの後、
参考画像の背景の雰囲気を継承したフィールドに切り替わる。

切り替えと同時に、
画面下部にRPG風のコマンドUIが出現する。
そのうちの一つが選択され、キャラクターが動き出す。

UI演出：
・半透明のウィンドウがスライドイン
・ピクセル風またはモダンなゲームUI
・軽く発光する枠（glow）
・カチッとした出現アニメーション

表示内容：
左側：キャラクターの名前、HP、MPゲージ
右側：数種類の参考画像から連想される必殺技(日本語名)
上部：参考画像から連想される敵キャラクター名

参考画像から連想される特殊な巨大な敵キャラクターが右奥に出現し、自キャラは左手前に配置され奥を向いている。

カメラ構図：
・左手前にプレイヤーキャラ
・右奥に敵
・ややローアングルで迫力

演出：
・キャラクターが、その見た目から連想される武器を持ち、戦闘ポーズに入り、敵キャラクターと正対し、軽くステップを踏む。一連の動作は超高速で一瞬で行われる。
・背景は軽く動く（particle, fog, energy）

スタイル：
cinematic, game UI overlay, ultra detailed, high contrast,
fantasy battle scene, dynamic lighting, volumetric light
```

### 620. 童年想象照进现实：赛车视频创作提示

**Author**: [Changning Liu](https://x.com/ChangningL29508)  **Date**: 2026-03-28  **Language**: en

> 一个复杂、多阶段的提示词，详细描述了一个无缝过渡的视频：从一个孩子玩玩具车 (微距写实)，到一个成年人在赛道上驾驶一辆真实的保时捷 911 GT3 (全尺寸力量)。它具体说明了时间安排、摄像机角度 (超低角度跟踪)、灯光、纹理细节，以及一个聚焦于驾驶员眼睛的情感高潮。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/d519f538df24987cf95bcb463e6b23c7/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/d519f538df24987cf95bcb463e6b23c7/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
0.0 – 4.0 sec — Childhood Imagination (Macro Realism)

Ultra-low-angle macro tracking shot, camera almost touching the ground.
Warm afternoon sunlight spills across a soft beige carpet, visible dust particles floating in air, subtle retro Kodak film warmth (natural, not stylized).

A small child’s hand (only hand visible, no face) pushes a red toy sports car forward.

Camera locks into a front-facing, low tracking perspective, moving with the toy car at increasing speed, mimicking a real race car POV.
Shallow depth of field, realistic motion blur, micro-texture detail on carpet fibers.

Emotion: curiosity → excitement building.

4.0 – 5.5 sec — Transition Through Darkness (Seamless Time Shift)

The toy car speeds into the dark shadow beneath a sofa.

As it enters darkness:

• Light collapses naturally (no artificial fade)
• Carpet texture stretches into subtle motion streaks
• Environment dissolves into full darkness

Seamless transition: the forward motion continues uninterrupted, creating a natural time-space shift (no jump cuts, no glitch effects).

5.5 – 9.0 sec — Reality Emerges (Full-Scale Power)

From darkness, the sound of a real engine ignites.

A real red Porsche 911 GT3 bursts out of shadow into a racetrack environment.

Lighting shifts to sharp, high-contrast daylight.
Cold gray asphalt, heat haze from tires, fine dust particles.

Camera remains low, tracking, and synchronized, maintaining the same motion direction and angle as the toy car shot—creating the illusion it's the same car, now full-scale.

Highly realistic physics:

• Tire grip and vibration
• Subtle suspension movement
• Natural reflections on glossy paint
• Emotion: awe → adrenaline → intensity.

9.0 – 12.0 sec — Human Connection (Emotional Peak)

Cut seamlessly into interior (motion-matched transition).
Close-up: adult driver’s hands gripping a suede racing wheel, wearing professional racing gloves.

Visible micro-details:

• Knuckle tension
• Slight sweat
• Gear shift impact vibration

Camera tilts upward smoothly to reveal the driver’s eyes inside helmet.

Eyes are sharp, focused, intense—mirroring childhood imagination now realized.
Sweat, breath, and subtle helmet reflections visible.

Final moment:
micro freeze-frame feeling (not a hard freeze) on the eyes, with slight camera vibration.
```

[[Toy Car To Real Race Car Transition]] [[Childhood To Adulthood]] [[Porsche 911 GT3]] [[Track Racing]] [[Seamless Transition]] [[Nostalgic Filmmaking]]

【镜头1 · 3s · 建立/爆发】 主体一：赛博女性 图片1 ，白色西装，机械颈骨，金齿轮耳环，红唇冷漠，黑发马尾，玄铁长刀 主体二：赛博男性 图片2 ，裸腹六块腹肌，Hello Kitty纹身，黑色机械甲肩臂，粉色金属货裤，白色AJ，武士刀 场景：参考图 图片3 巨型苔藓瀑布崖壁，白色水雾铺天，翠绿蕨类丛生，湿滑苔石 动作：男性从瀑布顶端纵身跃下，武士刀倒握反插，在水雾中高速坠落——子弹时间介入，镜头360度环绕静止身体，水珠悬浮，机械甲齿轮咬合细节锐利可见；时间恢复，男性砸落苔石台炸出十米裂缝，女性横向瞬移闪避，刀锋擦过发丝，黑发寸断飘散 风格：雾山五行国漫画风，硬边水墨线条，青银赤金高对比，电影级光影 镜头：跟随俯冲高速下降，子弹时间360度环绕，相机位于下坠轨迹平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：纵向引导线，瀑布与坠落轨迹重合，冲击点为焦点 氛围：极度压迫，生死一线，水雾爆散 音频：风声撕裂；子弹时间静默低频；落地轰鸣；配乐：单鼓重击起 【镜头2 · 4s · 转折/游斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀低扫连劈，动作凌厉 主体二：粉裤男性，机械臂格挡，赤金电弧炸裂 场景：瀑布中段苔藓岩壁平台，苔石踩碎，蕨类横飞，水雾被气劲切成丝状 动作：女性贴地滑步突进低扫脚踝——子弹时间介入，极近距特写刀锋与AJ鞋底仅差两毫米，鞋底被刀气削出焦痕，机械关节指节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，男性踏地弹身，燃焰武士刀劈向女性机械颈部，刀锋擦过颈部零件削飞旋转；二人蹬墙互踹，双腿空中碰撞爆发蓝金冲击波，双双震飞后空翻落地 风格：快切与子弹时间交替，打击感极强，细节残酷真实 镜头：贴地低速跟随切极端近距特写，相机位于地面贴近高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：极端近景景深，危险细节锐利，背景瀑布大虚化 氛围：千钧一发，窒息感 音频：刀锋擦骨金属尖啸；鞋底焦痕嗞嗞声；冲击波爆响；配乐：急促弦乐 【镜头3 · 4s · 高潮/环境缠斗】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀反握插地腾空旋踢 主体二：粉裤男性，抓蕨类藤蔓借力甩身，机械臂过载爆红 场景：瀑布底部水潭区，水面踩出巨型凹陷，苔石崩裂，蕨类连根拔起 动作：男性抓整棵蕨类横扫，女性长刀拦腰斩断——子弹时间介入，极近特写断面纤维纹理、刀锋残留绿色汁液、机械关节泛白细节定格；时间恢复，女性借反震旋身斜劈冰蓝刀气，男性机械臂过载硬接握碎，掌心蒸汽焦烟；二人扑摔入水潭缠斗翻滚，激起十米水柱折射金蓝彩虹 风格：慢动作细节特写与暴力冲击并行，环境破坏极致 镜头：子弹时间断面特写切回水柱爆发全景，相机位于水面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：水面倒影与真实动作上下对称，冲击点居中 氛围：野蛮爆裂，生死相搏 音频：树干断裂声；机械过载嗡鸣；水柱爆发轰响；配乐：低频战鼓爆点 【镜头4 · 4s · 终结/大招对轰】 主体一：白衣女性，长刀举顶，银冰光芒过载爆发，西装边缘被能量撕裂 主体二：粉裤男性，武士刀横胸，机械甲赤金全功率过载，粉裤猎猎飞扬 场景：瀑布正前方制高苔石台，百米瀑布为背景，水雾与光芒交融 动作：双方同时蓄力爆发，冰火双色能量柱冲天——子弹时间介入，极近特写女性瞳孔，倒映赤金火焰与男性全影，睫毛水雾微珠清晰，眼神由冷漠转决死；切至男性Hello Kitty纹身特写，纹身在赤金光下线条流动发光；时间恢复，双方全力冲刺对劈，两刀瀑布正中央对撞，炸出五十米冰火双色球形爆炸，瀑布从中间炸裂撕成两半；双方各自倒飞十米重砸苔石，烟尘渐散，二人喘息对望，画面定格 风格：子弹时间微距细节与终极爆炸超广角极致反差，震撼收束 镜头：眼部极端微距切超广角大爆炸全景，相机位于爆炸正面平行高度(thats where the camera is) 构图：爆炸中心点，冰火双色向四方放射，双角色对称分列 氛围：天崩地裂，毁灭级收束 音频：子弹时间静默心跳；双刀碰撞共鸣；爆炸巨响；配乐：单鼓定格，低频余震渐弱 无水印、无字幕、无文字叠加。

### 625. 日出时分，一位孤独的冒险家，电影感全景

> 一个详细的、多段提示词，专为 Seedance 2.0 设计，用于生成一个 15 秒的、高预算的、皮克斯品质的 3D 动画短片，讲述一只娇小但肌肉发达的仓鼠试图在人类健身房锻炼的故事，其中包含闹剧喜剧和电影级场景分解。

**Video**: [Watch](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/c00d8b7643189dcb94469c190bc4ce07/watch)
![Thumbnail](https://customer-qs6wnyfuv0gcybzj.cloudflarestream.com/c00d8b7643189dcb94469c190bc4ce07/thumbnails/thumbnail.jpg)

```
GAINS — Hamster Gym Bro A tiny golden hamster with disproportionately muscular arms, wearing a microscopic tank top that says "NO DAYS OFF," stands in front of a full sized human gym mirror doing bicep poses. A water bottle the size of his body sits beside him. High budget 3D animation, Pixar quality. 

[0s–1.5s] Interior of a high end gym. Normal humans work out in the background. Camera slowly lowers to ground level where a hamster stands on a tiny platform in front of the mirror, flexing intensely. 

[1.5s–3s] He waddles to the dumbbell rack. Grabs a full sized 1kg dumbbell. It's twenty times his size. He deadlifts it, face turning red, cheeks puffing out, tiny legs shaking. He gets it an inch off the ground. Drops it. Acts casual. 

[3s–5s] He climbs onto a treadmill. Hits the start button. It launches him off the back like a cannon. He tumbles across the floor, pops up immediately, walks back, and turns the speed down. Looks around to see if anyone noticed. 

[5s–7s] He tries the bench press. Uses two pencils as his barbell with erasers as weights. He presses it up, grunting dramatically. His spotter, a hamster half his size with glasses, holds one finger under the bar pretending to help. 

[7s–9s] He spots a human woman doing yoga. He rolls out a tiny mat next to her and attempts downward dog. His round body just creates a small furry lump. He holds it with fierce determination. Shaking. 

[9s–11s] Smoothie bar. He sits on the counter, orders a protein shake. The blender is bigger than his apartment. The shake comes in a thimble. He chugs it, slams the thimble down, wipes his mouth, and lets out a tiny belch that echoes. 

[11s–13s] He stands in the locker room doorway for the dramatic exit. Puts in tiny earbuds. His workout playlist starts. He slow motion walks toward the camera, an imaginary wind blowing his fur. 

[13s–15s] Wide shot of the gym parking lot. He walks toward a toy car, presses a key fob, the headlights flash. He climbs in, revs the engine, and peels out. The car is a hot pink Barbie jeep. He doesn't care. 

Cut to black. 3D animated, Pixar quality, hamster bodybuilder, gym comedy, miniature slapstick, cinematic lighting, 4K.
```
